text: ileyn pitegamaya di malil mshe 'im kal yiserael be'ivera deyaredena okhach yatehon 'al dechavu vemadebera ve'al dearegizu vemeyshera laqovel yam suf befaran deitapalu 'al mana uvachatserot dearegizu 'al bisera ve'al da'avadu 'egal didehav
mahalakh chad 'asar yomin mechorev orach tura dese'ir 'ad reqam geya
vahava bearebe'in shenin bechad 'asar yarecha bechad leyarecha malil mshe 'im beney yiserael kekhol di faqid yeya yateyh levatehon
batar dimecha yat sichon maleka deemoraa deyatev becheshebon veyat 'og maleka dematenan deyatev be'ashetarot beedere'i
be'ivera deyaredena beare'a demoav shari mshe paresh yat ulefan orayeta hada lemeymar
yeya elahana malil 'imana bechorev lemeymar sagi lekhon ditevetun betura hadeyn
itepenu vetulu lekhon ve'ulu letura deemoraa ulekhal magirohi bemeysheraya vetura uvishefeleta uvideroma uvisefar yama are'a dikhena'anaa velivenan 'ad nahara raba nahara ferat
chazey dihavit qodameykhon yat are'a 'ulu veachasinu yat are'a di qayam yeya laavahatekhon leaveraham leyitsechaq uleya'aqov lemitan lehon veliveneyhon batereyhon
vaamarit lekhon be'idana hahi lemeymar leyt ana yakhil bilechodi lesovara yatekhon
yeya elahakhon asegey yatekhon veha iteykhon yoma deyn kekhokhevey shemaya lemisegey
yeya elaha daavahatekhon yosef 'aleykhon kevatekhon alaf zimenin vivarekh yatekhon kema di malil lekhon
ekhedeyn esovar bilechodi tarechakhon ve'iseqeykhon vedinekhon
havu lekhon guverin chakimin vesukheletanun umade'an leshiveteykhon veemaninun reyshin 'aleykhon
vaatevetun yati vaamaretun taqin pitegama di maleleta leme'ebad
udevarit yat reyshey shiveteykhon guverin chakimin umade'an umaneti yatehon reyshin 'aleykhon rabaney alefin verabaney maavata verabaney chameshin verabaney 'isoreyata vesarekhin leshiveteykhon
ufaqedit yat dayaneykhon be'idana hahi lemeymar shema'u beyn acheykhon utedunun qusheta beyn gavera uveyn achuhi uveyn gioreyh
la tishetemode'un apin bedina miley ze'era kheraba tisheme'un la tidechalun min qodam gavera arey dina dayeya hu ufitegama di yiqeshey minekhon teqarevun levati veesheme'ineyh
ufaqedit yatekhon be'idana hahi yat kal pitegamaya di ta'ebedun
unetalena mechorev vehalikhena yat kal madebera raba udechila hahu di chazeytun orach tura deemoraa kema di faqid yeya elahana yatana vaateyna 'ad reqam geya
vaamarit lekhon ateytun 'ad tura deemoraa dayeya elahana yahev lana
chazey yehav yeya elahakh qodamakh yat are'a saq achasan kema di malil yeya elaha daavahatakh lakh la tidechal vela titevar
uqerevetun levati kulekhon vaamaretun nishelach guverin qodamana vialalun lana yat are'a vitivun yatana pitegama yat arecha di niseq bah veyat qirevaya di ne'ol lehen
ushefar be'eynay pitegama udevarit minekhon tereyn 'asar guverin gavera chad leshiveta
veitepeniu useliqu letura vaato 'ad nachala deetekala vealilu yatah
unesivu videyhon meiba deare'a vaachitu lana vaativu yatana pitegama vaamaru tava are'a dayeya elahana yahev lana
vela avitun lemisaq vesarevetun 'al meymera dayeya elahakhon
veitera'ametun bemashekeneykhon vaamaretun bidesaney yeya yatana apeqana meare'a demitserayim lemimesar yatana bida deemoraa leshetsayutana
lean anachena saleqin achana tevaru yat libana lemeymar 'am sagi vetaqif minana qirevin raverevan ukherikhan 'ad tseyt shemaya veaf beney gibaraey chazeyna taman
vaamarit lekhon la titaverun vela tidechalun minehon
yeya elahakhon dimedabar qodameykhon hu yegicha lekhon kekhol di 'avad 'imekhon bemitserayim le'eyneykhon
uvemadebera di chazeyta di soverakh yeya elahakh kema di mesovar gevar yat bereyh bekhal arecha di halekhetun 'ad meyteykhon 'ad atera hadeyn
uvefitegama hadeyn leyteykhon meheymenin bemeymera dayeya elahakhon
di medaber qodameykhon bearecha leateqenaa lekhon atar beyt meysheri leasherayutekhon be'amuda deeshata beleyleya leachazayutekhon bearecha di tehakhun bah uve'amuda da'anana bimama
ushemi'a qodam yeya yat qal pitegameykhon uregez veqayam lemeymar
im yechezey gevar beguveraya haileyn dara visha hadeyn yat are'a taveta di qayemit lemitan laavahatekhon
elahen kalev bar yefune hu yechezinah veleyh eten yat are'a di derakh bah velivenohi chalaf di ashelim batar dachaleta dayeya
af 'alay hava regaz min qodam yeya bedilekhon lemeymar af at la te'ol taman
yehoshu'a bar nun deqaem qodamakh hu ye'ol taman yateyh taqef arey hu yacheseninah leyiserael
vetafelekhon di amaretun leviza yehon uveneykhon di la yeda'u yoma deyn tav uvish inun ya'alun letaman ulehon eteninah veinun yeyretunah
veatun itepeniu lekhon vetulu lemadebera orach yama desuf
vaatevetun vaamaretun li chavena qodam yeya anachena nisaq unegicha beyh qerav kekhol di faqedana yeya elahana vezarezetun gevar yat maney qeraveyh veshareytun lemisaq letura
vaamar yeya li emar lehon la tisequn vela tegichun qerav arey leyt shekhineti shareya veyneykhon vela titaverun qodam ba'aley devaveykhon
umalelit 'imekhon vela qabeletun vesarevetun 'al gezerat meymera dayeya vearesha'etun useleqetun letura
unefaq emoraa deyatev betura hahu leqadamutekhon uredafu yatekhon kema di natezan dabareyata uteradu yatekhon bese'ir 'ad charema
vetavetun uvekhitun qodam yeya vela qabil yeya tselotekhon vela atseyt lemileykhon
vitevetun bireqam yomin sagiin keyomaya di yetevetun
veitepeneyna unetalena lemadebera orach yama desuf kema di malil yeya 'imi veaqefena yat tura dese'ir yomin sagiin
vaamar yeya li lemeymar
sagi lekhon deaqefetun yat tura hadeyn itepeniu lekhon tsipuna
veyat 'ama paqed lemeymar atun 'averin bitechum achukhon beney 'esav deyatevin bese'ir veyidechalun minekhon vetisetamerun lachada
la titegarun behon arey la eten lekhon meare'ahon 'ad miderakh paresat rigela arey yeruta le'esav yehavit yat tura dese'ir
'ivura tizebenun minehon bekhasepa veteykhelun veaf maya tikherun minehon bekhasepa vetishetun
arey yeya elahakh berekhakh bekhal 'ovad yedakh sapeq lakh tsarekakh bemehekhakh lemadebera raba hadeyn denan arebe'in shenin meymera dayeya elahakh besa'adakh la mena'eta mida'am
va'avarena miqodam achuna veney 'esav deyatevin bese'ir meorach meyshera meeylat ume'etseyon gaver veitepeneyna va'avarena orach madebera demoav
vaamar yeya li la tetsur 'al moavaey vela titegarey leme'ebad 'imehon qerav arey la eten lakh meare'eyh yeruta arey liveney lot yehavit yat lechayat yeruta
eymetaney mileqademin yetivu vah 'am rav vesagi vetaqif kegibaraya
gibaraey mitechashevin af inun kegibaraey umoavaey yiqeran lehon eymetaney
uvese'ir yetivu choraey mileqademin uveney 'esav tarekhunun veshetsayunun miqadameyhon vitivu beatereyhon kema di 'avad yiserael leare'a yerutateyh dihav yeya lehon
ke'an qumu ve'ivaru lekhon yat nachala dezared va'avarena yat nachala dezared
veyomaya di halekhena mereqam geya 'ad di 'avarena yat nachala dezered telatin vetameney shenin 'ad desaf kal dara guverey megichey qerava migo masherita kema di qayim yeya lehon
veaf macha min qodam yeya havat behon leshetsayutehon migo masherita 'ad dishelimu
vahava kad shelimu kal guverey megichey qerava limemat migo 'ama
umalil yeya 'imi lemeymar
at 'aver yoma deyn yat techum moav yat lechayat
vetiqerav laqovel beney 'amon la tetsur 'aleyhon vela titegarey leme'ebad 'imehon qerav arey la eten meare'a veney 'amon lakh yeruta arey liveney lot yehavitah yeruta
are'a gibaraya mitechasheva af hi gibaraey yativu vah mileqademin ve'amonaey qeran lehon chushebaney
'am rav vesagi vetaqif kegibaraya veshetsinun yeya miqodameyhon vetarekhunun vitivu veatereyhon
kema di 'avad liveney 'esav deyatevin bese'ir di shetsey yat choraey miqodameyhon vetarekhunun vitivu veatereyhon 'ad yoma hadeyn
ve'avaey deyatevin bideficha 'ad 'aza qaputeqaey dinefaqu miqaputeqaya shetsunun vitivu veatereyhon
qumu tulu ve'ivaru yat nachala dearenon chazey dimesarit bidakh yat sichon maleka decheshebon emoraa veyat are'eyh sharey letarakhuteyh veitegarey leme'ebad 'imeyh qerava
yoma hadeyn esharey lemitan zu'etakh vedachaletakh 'al apey 'amemaya di techot kal shemaya di yisheme'un shime'akh vizu'un veyidechalun min qodamakh
ushelachit izegadin mimadebera diqedemot levat sichon maleka decheshebon pitegamey shelama lemeymar
e'ibar beare'akh bearecha bearecha ezel la esetey yamina usemala
'ivura vekhasepa tezaben li veeykhul umaya bekhasepa titen li veeshetey lechod e'ivar beragelay
kema di 'avadu li beney 'esav deyatevin bese'ir umoavaey deyatevin bilechayat 'ad dee'ivar yat yaredena leare'a dayeya elahana yahev lana
vela avey sichon maleka decheshebon lemishebeqana leme'ebar bitechumeyh arey aqeshey yeya elahakh yat rucheyh vetaqif yat libeyh bedil lemimesereyh bidakh keyoma hadeyn

veitepeneyna useleqena orach dematenan unefaq 'og maleka dematenan leqadamutana hu vekhal 'ameyh laagacha qerava edere'i
vaamar yeya li la tidechal yateyh arey vidakh mesarit yateyh veyat kal 'ameyh veyat are'eyh veta'ebed leyh kema di 'avadeta lesichon maleka deemoraa di yatev becheshebon
umesar yeya elahana bidana af yat 'og maleka dematenan veyat kal 'ameyh umechinohi 'ad dela ishetaar leyh meshezev
ukhevashena yat kal qirevohi be'idana hahi la havat qareta di la nesivena minehon shitin qirevin kal beyt palakh terakhona malekevata de'og bematenan
kal ileyn qirevin kerikhan maqefan shur ram dilehen dashin ve'aberin bar miqirevey patsechaya sagi lachada
vegamarena yatehon kema di 'avadena lesichon maleka decheshebon gamar kal qirevey guveraya neshaya vetafela
vekhal be'ira va'adi qirevaya bazana lana
unesivena be'idana hahi yat are'a miyada tereyn malekhey emoraa di be'ivera deyaredena minachala dearenon 'ad tura decheremon
tsidonaey qeran lecheremon sireyon veemoraey qeran leyh tur talega
kol qirevey meyshera vekhal gile'ad vekhal dematenan 'ad salekha veedere'i qirevey malekevata de'og bematenan
arey lechod 'og maleka dematenan ishetaar mishear gibaraya ha 'areseyh 'aresa defarezela hala hi berabat beney 'amon tesha' amin arekah veareba' amin petayah beamat melakh
veyat are'a hada yeritena be'idana hahi me'aro'er di 'al nachala dearenon ufalegut tura degile'ad veqirevohi yehavit leshiveta direuven uleshiveta degad
ushear gile'ad vekhal dematenan malekevata de'og yehavit lefalegut shiveta dimenashe kol beyt palakh terakhona lekhal matenan hahu miteqerey are'a gibaraya
yair bar menashe nesiv yat kal beyt palakh terakhona 'ad techum geshuraa veafeqeyros uqera yatehon 'al shemeyh yat matenan kaferaney yair 'ad yoma hadeyn
ulemakhir yehavit yat gile'ad
uleshiveta direuven uleshiveta degad yehavit min gile'ad ve'ad nachala dearenon go nachala utechum ve'ad yuveqa denachala techum beney 'amon
umeyshera veyaredena utechumeyh migenosar ve'ad yama demeyshera yama demilecha techot mashepakh meramata madinecha
ufaqedit yatekhon be'idana hahi lemeymar yeya elahakhon yehav lekhon yat are'a hada lemeyretah mezarezin ta'eberun qodam acheykhon beney yiserael kal mezarezey cheyla
lechod nesheykhon vetafelekhon uve'irekhon yeda'ena arey ve'ir sagi lekhon yetevun beqireveykhon di yehavit lekhon
'ad di yenicha yeya laacheykhon kevatekhon veyeretun af inun yat are'a dayeya elahakhon yahev lehon be'ivera deyaredena utetuvun gevar liruteteyh di yehavit lekhon
veyat yehoshu'a paqedit be'idana hahi lemeymar 'eynaykh chazaa yat kal di 'avad yeya elahakhon litereyn malekhaya haileyn ken ya'ebed yeya lekhal malekevata di at 'aver letaman
la tidechalun minehon arey yeya elahakhon meymereyh yegicha lekhon
vetsaleyti qodam yeya be'idana hahi lemeymar
yeya elohim at shareyta leachazaa yat 'avedakh yat revutakh veyat yedakh taqefeta di at hu elaha dishekhinetakh bishemaya mile'ela veshalit beare'a veleyt deya'ebed ke'ovadaykh ukhegibaretakh
e'ivar ke'an veechezey yat are'a taveta di be'ivera deyaredena tura tava hadeyn uveyt maqedasha
vahava regaz min qodam yeya 'alay bedilekhon vela qabil mini vaamar yeya li sagi lakh la tosef lemalala qodamay 'od befitegama hadeyn
saq lereysh ramata uzeqof 'eynaykh lema'arava uletsipuna velideroma ulemadinecha vachazey ve'eynayikh arey la te'ivar yat yaredena hadeyn
ufaqed yat yehoshu'a vetaqefehi vealemehi arey hu ye'ivar qodam 'ama hadeyn vehu yachesen yatehon yat are'a di techezey
vitevena vecheylata laqovel beyt pe'or
ukhe'an yiserael shema' liqeyamaya uledinaya di ana mealef yatekhon leme'ebad bedil deteychun veteytun veteyretun yat are'a di yeya elaha daavahatekhon yahev lekhon
la tosefun 'al pitegama di ana mefaqed yatekhon vela timene'un mineyh lemitar yat piqudaya dayeya elahakhon di ana mefaqed yatekhon
'eyneykhon chazan yat di 'avad yeya beva'al pe'or arey kal gavera di azal batar ba'al pe'or shetseyeyh yeya elahakh mibeynakh
veatun deadebeqetun bedachaleta dayeya elahakhon qayamin kulekhon yoma deyn
chazo dealefit yatekhon qeyamaya vedinaya kema di faqedani yeya elahay leme'ebad ken bego are'a di atun 'alin taman lemeyretah
vetiterun veta'ebedun arey hi chakhematekhon vesukheletanutekhon le'eyney 'amemaya di yisheme'un yat kal qeyamaya haileyn veyemerun lechod 'am chakim vesukheletan 'ama raba hadeyn
arey man 'am rav di leyh elaha qariv leyh leqabala tseloteyh be'idan 'aqeteyh kayeya elahana bekhal 'idan daanachena metsalin qodamohi
uman 'am rav di leyh qeyamin vedinin qashitin kekhol orayeta hada di ana yahev qodameykhon yoma deyn
lechod isetamar lakh vetar nafeshakh lachada dilema tineshey yat pitegamaya di chazo 'eynayikh vedilema ye'idun milibakh kol yomey chayaykh utehode'inun livenaykh veliveney venaykh

yoma di qameta qodam yeya elahakh bechorev kad amar yeya li kenosh qodamay yat 'ama veasheme'inun yat pitegamay di yelefun lemidechal qodamay kal yomaya di inun qayamin 'al are'a veyat beneyhon yalefun
uqerevetun veqametun beshipoley tura vetura ba'er beeshata 'ad tseyt shemaya chashokha 'anana vaamiteta
umalil yeya 'imekhon migo eshata qal pitegamin atun shame'in udemut leyteykhon chazan elahen qala
vechavi lekhon yat qeyameyh di faqid yatekhon leme'ebad 'aseret pitegamin ukhetavinun 'al tereyn luchey avenaya
veyati paqid yeya be'idana hahi lealafa yatekhon qeyamin vedinin leme'ebadekhon yatehon beare'a di atun 'averin taman lemeyretah
vetisetamerun lachada lenafeshateykhon arey la chazeytun kal demut beyoma di malil yeya 'imekhon bechorev migo eshata
dilema techabelun veta'ebedun lekhon tselem demut kal tsura demut dekhar o nuqeba
demut kal be'ira di veare'a demut kal tsipar gadefa di farach baaver reqi'a shemaya
demut kal richasha di veare'a demut kal nuney di vemaya milera' leare'a

vedilema tizeqof 'eynaykh lishemaya vetechezey yat shimesha veyat sihara veyat kokhevaya kol cheyley shemaya vetite'ey vetisegud lehon vetifelechinun di zamin yeya elahakh yatehon lekhol 'amemaya techot kal shemaya
veyatekhon qariv yeya ledachaleteyh veapeq yatekhon mikura defarezela mimitserayim lemehevey leyh le'ama achasana keyoma hadeyn
umin qodam yeya hava regaz 'alay 'al pitegameykhon veqayim bedil dela leme'avar yat yaredena uvedil dela lemey'al leare'a tava di yeya elahakh yahev lakh achasana
arey ana mait beare'a hada leyt ana 'aver yat yaredena veatun 'averin veteyretun yat are'a tava hada
isetamaru lekhon dilema titineshun yat qeyama dayeya elahakhon di gezar 'imekhon veta'ebedun lekhon tselem demut kola di faqedakh yeya elahakh
arey yeya elahakh meymereyh esha akhela hu el qana
arey toledun benin uveney venin vetite'atequn beare'a utechabelun veta'ebedun tselem demut kola veta'ebedun devish qodam yeya elahakh learegaza qodamohi
asehedit bekhon yoma deyn yat shemaya veyat are'a arey meyvad teyvedun biferi'a me'al are'a di atun 'averin yat yaredena letaman lemeyretah la torekhun yomin 'alah arey ishetetsaa tishetetsun
vivadar yeya yatekhon be'amemaya vetishetaarun 'am demineyan be'amemaya di yedabar yeya yatekhon letaman
vetifelechun taman le'amemaya falechey ta'avata 'ovad yedey enasha a'a veavena di la yechezun vela shame'in vela akhelin vela merichin
vetitebe'un mitaman dachaleta dayeya elahakh vetishekach arey tive'ey min qodamohi bekhal libakh uvekhal nafeshakh
kad yey'oq lakh veyashekechunakh kol pitegamaya haileyn besof yomaya utetuv ledachaleta dayeya elahakh uteqabel lemeymereyh
arey elaha rachamana yeya elahakh la yishebeqinakh vela yechabelinakh vela yitineshey yat qeyama daavahatakh di qayim lehon
arey sheel ke'an leyomaya qademaey dahavo qodamakh lemin yoma di vera yeya adam 'al are'a ulemiseyafey shemaya ve'ad seyafey shemaya hahava kefitegama raba hadeyn o haishetema' kevateyh
hashema' 'ama qal meymera dayeya memalel migo eshata kema di shema'at at veyiteqayam

o nisin di 'avad yeya leitegalaa lemiferaq leyh 'am migo 'am benisin beatin uvemofetin uviqerava uvida taqifa uvidera'a merama uvechezevanin raverevin kekhol di 'avad lekhon yeya elahakhon bemitserayim le'eynaykh
at itechazeyta lemida' arey yeya hu elohim leyt 'od bar mineyh
min shemaya asheme'akh yat qal meymereyh lealafutakh ve'al are'a achezeyakh yat eshateyh rabeta ufitegamohi shema'at migo eshata
vacholaf arey rechim yat avahatakh veitire'ey vivenohi baterohi veapeqakh bemeymereyh becheyleyh raba mimitserayim
letarakha 'amemin raverevin vetaqifin minakh min qodamakh lea'alutakh lemitan lakh yat are'ahon achasana keyoma hadeyn

leme'iroq taman qatola di yiqetol yat chavereyh bela manede'ey vehu la saney leyh meitemaley umideqamohi veye'iroq lechad min qirevaya haileyn veyiteqayam
yat betser bemadebera beare'a meyshera leshiveta direuven veyat ramot bagile'ad leshiveta degad veyat golan bematenan leshiveta dimenashe
veda orayeta di sadar mshe qodam beney yiserael
ileyn sahedevata uqeyamaya vedinaya di malil mshe 'im beney yiserael bemipaqehon mimitserayim
be'ivera deyaredena becheylata laqovel beyt pe'or beare'a desichon maleka deemoraa di yatev becheshebon di mecha mshe uveney yiserael bemipaqehon mimitserayim
viritu yat are'eyh veyat are'a de'og maleka dematenan tereyn malekhey emoraa di be'ivera deyaredena midenach shimesha
me'aro'er di 'al keyf nachala dearenon ve'ad tura desion hu cheremon
vekhal meyshera 'ivera deyaredena lemadinecha ve'ad yama demeyshera techot mashepakh meramata
uqera mshe lekhal yiserael vaamar lehon shema' yiserael yat qeyamaya veyat dinaya di ana memalel qodameykhon yoma deyn vetalefun yatehon vetiterun leme'ebadehon
yeya elahana gezar 'imana qeyam bechorev
la 'im avahatana gezar yeya yat qeyama hada elahen 'imana anachena ileyn hakha yoma deyn kulana qayamin
mamelal 'im mamelal malil yeya 'imekhon betura migo eshata
ana haveyti qaem beyn meymera dayeya uveyneykhon be'idana hahi lechavaa lekhon yat pitegama dayeya arey decheletun miqodam eshata vela seleqetun betura lemeymar
ana yeya elahakh di apeqetakh meare'a demitserayim mibeyt 'aveduta
la yehe lakh elaha achoran bar mini
la ta'ebed lakh tselem kal demut di vishemaya mile'ela vedi veare'a milera' vedi vemaya milera' leare'a
la tisegud lehon vela tifelechinun arey ana yeya elahakh el qana mase'ar chovey avahan 'al benin meradin 'al dar telitay ve'al dar revi'ay lesaneay kad meshalemin benaya lemechetey batar avahatehon
ve'aved teyvu lealefey darin lerachamay ulenaterey fiqoday
la teymey yat shema dayeya elahakh lemagana arey la yezakey yeya yat di yemey vishemeyh leshiqera
tar yat yoma deshabeta leqadashuteyh kema di faqedakh yeya elahakh
shita yomin tifelach veta'ebed kal 'ividetakh

veyoma shevi'aa shabeta qodam yeya elahakh la ta'ebed kal 'ivida at uverakh uveratakh ve'avedakh veametakh vetorakh vachamarakh vekhal be'irakh vegiorakh di veqirevakh bedil di yenucha 'avedakh veametakh kevatakh
vetidekar arey 'aveda haveyta beare'a demitserayim veapeqakh yeya elahakh mitaman bida taqifa uvidera'a merama 'al ken paqedakh yeya elahakh leme'ebad yat yoma deshabeta
yaqar yat avukh veyat imakh kema di faqedakh yeya elahakh bedil deyorekhun yomaykh uvedil deyotev lakh 'al are'a dayeya elahakh yahev lakh
la tiqetol nefash vela teguf vela tigenov vela tasehed bechaverakh sahaduta deshiqera
vela tachemed itat chaverakh vela terog beyt chaverakh chaqeleyh ve'avedeyh veameteyh toreyh vachamareyh vekhol di lechaverakh
yat pitegamaya haileyn malil yeya 'im kal qehalekhon betura migo eshata 'anana vaamiteta qal rav vela fesaq ukhetavinun 'al tereyn luchey avenaya vihavinun li
vahava kad shema'akhon yat qala migo chashokha vetura ba'er beeshata veqarevetun levati kal reyshey shiveteykhon vesaveykhon
vaamaretun ha achezeyana yeya elahana yat yeqareyh veyat revuteyh veyat qal meymereyh shema'ena migo eshata yoma hadeyn chazeyna arey yemalel yeya 'im anasha veyiteqayam
ukhe'an lema nemut arey teykhelinana eshata rabeta hada im mosefin anachena lemishema' yat qal meymera dayeya elahana 'od umayetin anachena
arey man kal bisera di shema' qal meymera dayeya qayama memalel migo eshata kevatana veiteqayam
qerav at ushema' yat kal di yeymar yeya elahana veat temalel 'imana yat kal di malel yeya elahana 'imakh uneqabel vena'ebed
ushemi'a qodam yeya yat qal pitegameykhon bemalalutekhon 'imi vaamar yeya li shemi'a qodamay yat qal pitegamey 'ama hadeyn di malilu 'imakh ateqinu kal di malilu
levay di yehey liba hadeyn lehon lemidechal qodamay ulemitar yat kal piquday kal yomaya bedil deyeytav lehon veliveneyhon le'alam
izel emar lehon tuvu lekhon lemashekeneykhon
veat hakha qim qodamay veemalel 'imakh yat kal tafeqedeta uqeyamaya vedinaya di talefun veya'ebedun beare'a di ana yahev lehon lemeyretah
vetiterun leme'ebad kema di faqid yeya elahakhon yatekhon la tisetun yamina usemala
bekhal arecha di faqid yeya elahakhon yatekhon tehakhun bedil deteychun veyeytav lekhon vetorekhun yomin beare'a di teyretun
veda tafeqedeta qeyamaya vedinaya di faqid yeya elahakhon lealafa yatekhon leme'ebad beare'a di atun 'averin taman lemeyretah
bedil detidechal qodam yeya elahakh lemitar yat kal qeyamohi ufiqudohi di ana mefaqedakh at uverakh uvar berakh kal yomey chayaykh uvedil deyorekhun yomaykh
uteqabel yiserael vetitar leme'ebad di yeytav lakh vedi tisegun lachada kema di malil yeya elaha daavahatakh lakh are'a 'aveda chalav udevash
shema' yiserael yeya elahana yeya chad
vetirecham yat yeya elahakh bekhal libakh uvekhal nafeshakh uvekhal nikhesakh
vihon pitegamaya haileyn di ana mefaqedakh yoma deyn 'al libakh
utetaninun livenaykh utemalel behon bemitevakh beveytakh uvimehakhakh bearecha uvemishekevakh uvimeqimakh
vetiqeterinun leat 'al yedakh vihon litefilin beyn 'eynaykh
vetikhetevinun 'al mezuzeyan vetiqebe'inun besipey veytakh uvetare'aykh
vihey arey ya'elinakh yeya elahakh leare'a di qayim laavahatakh leaveraham leyitsechaq uleya'aqov lemitan lakh qirevin raverevan vetavan di la veneyta
uvatin melan kal tuv di la maleyta vegubin pesilan di la fesaleta karemin vezeytin di la netseveta veteykhul vetiseba'
isetamar lakh dilema tineshey yat dachaleta dayeya di apeqakh meare'a demitserayim mibeyt 'aveduta
yat yeya elahakh tidechal veqadamohi tifelach uvishemeyh teqayam
la tehakhun batar ta'avat 'amemaya mita'avat 'amemaya di vesacharaneykhon
arey el qana yeya elahakh shekhineteyh beynakh dilema yiteqef rageza dayeya elahakh bakh vishetsakh me'al apey are'a
la tenasun qodam yeya elahakhon kema di nasetun beniseyta
mitar titerun yat piqudaya dayeya elahakhon usehedevateyh uqeyamohi di faqedakh
veta'ebed dekhashar udetaqen qodam yeya bedil deyeytav lakh vete'ul veteyrat yat are'a taveta di qayim yeya laavahatakh
lemitevar yat kal ba'aley devavakh miqodamakh kema di malil yeya
arey yishealinakh berakh mechar lemeymar ma sahedevata uqeyamaya vedinaya di faqid yeya elahana yatekhon
veteymar livenakh 'avedin haveyna lefare'o bemitserayim veapeqana yeya mimitserayim bida taqifa
vihav yeya atin umofetin raverevin uvishin bemitserayim befare'o uvekhal enash beyteyh le'eynana
veyatana apeq mitaman bedil lea'ala yatana lemitan lana yat are'a di qayim laavahatana
ufaqedana yeya leme'ebad yat kal qeyamaya haileyn lemidechal yat yeya elahana letav lana kal yomaya leqayamutana keyoma hadeyn
vezakhuta tehey lana arey nitar leme'ebad yat kal tafeqedeta hada qodam yeya elahana kema di faqedana

arey ye'elinakh yeya elahakh leare'a di at 'alel letaman lemeyretah vitarekh 'amemin sagiin min qodamakh chitaey vegiregashaey veemoraey ukhena'anaey uferizaey vechivaey vivusaey shive'a 'amemin sagiin vetaqifin minakh
veyimeserinun yeya elahakh qodamakh vetimechinun gamara tegamar yatehon la tigezar lehon qeyam vela teracham 'aleyhon
vela titechatan behon beratakh la titen livereyh uverateyh la tisav liverakh
arey yate'ayan yat berakh mibatar palechani veyifelechun leta'avat 'amemaya veyiteqef rageza dayeya bekhon vishetsakh biferi'a
arey im kedeyn ta'ebedun lehon egoreyhon tetare'un veqamatehon tetaberun vaashereyhon teqotsetsun vetsalemey ta'avatehon toqedun benura
arey 'am qadish at qodam yeya elahakh bakh itire'ey yeya elahakh lemehevey leyh le'am chabiv mikol 'amemaya di 'al apey are'a
la midesagiin atun mikal 'amemaya tsavey yeya bekhon veitire'ey vekhon arey atun ze'erin mikal 'amemaya
arey mideracham yeya yatekhon umidinetar yat qeyama di qayim laavahatekhon apeyq yeya yatekhon bida taqifa ufareqakh mibeyt 'aveduta mida defare'o maleka demitserayim
vetida' arey yeya elahakh hu elohim elaha meheymena nater qeyama vechiseda lerachamohi ulenaterey fiqodohi lealefey darin
umeshalem lesaneohi tavan di inun 'avedin qodamohi bechayeyhon leovadeyhon la meachar 'ovad tav lesaneohi tavevan di inun 'avedin qodamohi bechayeyhon meshalem lehon
vetitar yat tafeqedeta veyat qeyamaya veyat dinaya di ana mefaqedakh yoma deyn leme'ebadehon
vihey cholaf di teqabelun yat dinaya haileyn vetiterun veta'ebedun yatehon veyitar yeya elahakh lakh yat qeyama veyat chiseda di qayim laavahatakh
veyirechaminakh vivarekhinakh veyaseginakh vivarekh valeda dime'akh veiba deare'akh 'ivurakh vechamerakh umishechakh baqerey toraykh ve'ederey 'anakh 'al are'a di qayim laavahatakh lemitan lakh
berikh tehey mikal 'amemaya la yehey vakh 'aqar ve'aqera uvive'irakh
veye'edey yeya minakh kal mare'in vekhal makheteshey mitserayim bishaya di yeda'at la yeshavinun bakh veyiteninun bekhal saneakh
utegamar yat kal 'amemaya di yeya elahakh yahev lakh la techus 'eynakh 'aleyhon vela tifelach yat ta'avatehon arey letaqela hu lakh
dilema teymar belibakh sagiin 'amemaya haileyn mini ekhedeyn ikul letarakhutehon
la tidechal minehon midekar tidekar yat di 'avad yeya elahakh lefare'o ulekhal mitserayim
nisin raverevin di chazaa 'eynakh veataya umofetaya vida taqefeta udera'a meramema di apeqakh yeya elahakh ken ya'ebed yeya elahakh lekhal 'amemaya di at dachel miqodameyhon
veaf yat 'ara'ita yegarey yeya elahakh behon 'ad diyevadun deishetaaru udeitamaru miqodamakh
la titevar miqodameyhon arey yeya elahakh shekhineteyh beynakh elaha raba udechila
vitarekh yeya elahakh yat 'amemaya haileyn miqodamakh ze'er ze'er la tikul leshetsayutehon biferi'a dilema tisegey 'alakh cheyvat bara
veyimeserinun yeya elahakh qodamakh vishageshinun shigush rav 'ad disheytsinun
veyimesar malekheyhon bidakh vetovad yat shimehon mitechot shemaya la yite'atad enash miqodamakh 'ad detisheytsey yatehon
tsalemey ta'avatehon toqedun benura la tachemed kasepa vedahava di 'aleyhon vetisav lakh dilema titaqal beyh arey merachaqa dayeya elahakh hu
vela ta'el dimerachaq leveytakh utehey cherema kevateyh shaqatsa teshaqetsineyh verachaqa terachaqineyh arey cherema hu
kal tafeqedeta di ana mefaqedakh yoma deyn titerun leme'ebad bedil deteychun vetisegun veteytun veteyretun yat are'a di qayim yeya laavahatekhon
vetidekar yat kal arecha di daberakh yeya elahakh denan arebe'in shenin bemadebera bedil le'anayutakh lenasayutakh lemida' yat di velibakh hatitar piqudohi im la

ve'aneyakh veakhepanakh veokhalakh yat mana di la yeda'eta vela yade'un avahataykh bedil leoda'utakh arey la 'al lachema vilechodohi miteqayam enasha arey 'al kal apaqut meymera dayeya yiteqayam enasha
kesutakh la iveliat minakh umesanakh la yechefu denan arebe'in shenin
vetida' 'im libakh arey kema di mealef gavera yat bereyh yeya elahakh mealef lakh
vetitar yat piqudaya dayeya elahakh limehakh bearechan detaqenan qodamohi ulemidechal yateyh
arey yeya elahakh ma'alakh leare'a taveta are'a nageda nachalin demayin mabu'ey 'eynayan utehomin nafeqin beviqe'an uveturin
are'a chitin vesa'arin vegufenin uteenin verimonin are'a dezeytaha 'avedin mishecha vehi 'aveda devash
are'a di la ve'itsurin teykhul bah lachema la techesar kal mida'am bah are'a di avenaha farezela umituraha tifesul nechasha
veteykhul vetiseba' utevarakh yat yeya elahakh 'al are'a taveta dihav lakh
isetamar lakh dilema titeneshey yat dachaleta dayeya elahakh bedil dela lemitar piqodohi vedinohi uqeyamohi di ana mefaqedakh yoma deyn
dilema teykhul vetiseba' uvatin shapirin tiveney veteytev
vetorakh ve'anakh yisegun vekhasepa vedahava yisege lakh vekhol di lakh yisege
virim libakh vetineshey yat dachaleta dayeya elahakh di apeqakh meare'a demitserayim mibeyt 'aveduta
dedaberakh bemadebera raba udechila atar cheyvan qalan ve'aqerabin uveyt tsachavana atar di leyt maya deapeq lakh maya mitinara taqifa
deokhalakh mana bemadebera di la yade'un avahatakh bedil le'anayutakh uvedil lenasayutakh leotava lakh besofakh
veteymar belibakh cheyli uteqef yedi qeno li yat nikhesaya haileyn
vetidekar yat yeya elahakh arey hu yahev lakh 'etsa lemiqeney nikhesin bedil leqayama yat qeyameyh di qayim laavahatakh keyoma hadeyn
vihey im mineshaa tineshey yat dachaleta dayeya elahakh utehakh batar ta'avat 'amemaya vetifelechinun vetisegud lehon asehedit bekhon yoma deyn arey meyvad teyvedun
ke'amemaya di yeya movid miqadameykhon ken teyvedun cholaf dila qabeletun bemeymera dayeya elahakhon
shema' yiserael at 'aver yoma deyn yat yaredena leme'al lemeyrat 'amemin raverevin vetaqifin minakh qirevin raverevan ukherikhan 'ad tseyt shemaya
'am rav vetaqif beney gibaraya di at yeda'at veat shema'at man yikul lemeyqam qodam beney gibaraya
vetida' yoma deyn arey yeya elahakh hu de'ivar qodamakh meymereyh esha akhela hu yeshetsinun vehu yetarekhinun qodamakh utetarekhinun vetovedinun biferi'a kema di malil yeya lakh
la teymar belibakh bideyitevar yeya elahakh yatehon miqodamakh lemeymar bezakhuti a'alani yeya lemeyrat yat are'a hada uvechovey 'amemaya haileyn yeya metarekh lehon miqodamakh

la vezakhutakh uveqashitut libakh at 'alel lemeyrat yat are'ahon arey bechovey 'amemaya haileyn yeya elahakh metarekhehon miqodamakh uvedil laaqama yat pitegama di qayim yeya laavahatakh leaveraham leyitsechaq uleya'aqov
vetida' arey la vezakhutakh yeya elahakh yahev lakh yat are'a taveta hada lemeyretah arey 'am qeshey qedal at
hevey dekhir la tineshey yat di aregezeta qodam yeya elahakh bemadebera lemin yoma di nefaqeta meare'a demitserayim 'ad meyteykhon 'ad atera hadeyn mesarevin haveytun qodam yeya
uvechorev aregezetun qodam yeya vahava regaz min qodam yeya bekhon leshetsaa yatekhon
bemiseqi letura lemisav luchey avenaya luchey qeyama di gezar yeya 'imekhon vitevit betura arebe'in yemamin vearebe'in leylavan lachema la akhalit umaya la isheteyti
vihav yeya li yat tereyn luchey avenaya ketivin beetsebe'a dayeya va'aleyhon kekhal pitegamaya di malil yeya 'imekhon betura migo eshata beyoma diqehala
vahava misof arebe'in yemamin vearebe'in leylavan yehav yeya li yat tereyn luchey avenaya luchey qeyama
vaamar yeya li qum chut biferi'a mika arey chabil 'amakh di apeqeta mimitserayim satu biferi'a min arecha di faqedetinun 'avadu lehon matekha
vaamar yeya li lemeymar geli qodamay yat 'ama hadeyn veha 'am qeshey qedal hu
anach ba'utakh miqodamay veeshetsinun veemechey yat shimehon mitechot shemaya vee'ebed yatakh le'am taqif vesagi minehon
veitepeneyti unechatit min tura vetura ba'er beeshata utereyn luchey qeyama 'al tareteyn yeday
vachazeyti veha chavetun qodam yeya elahakhon 'avadetun lekhon 'egel matekha setetun biferi'a min arecha di faqid yeya yatekhon
vaachadit bitereyn luchaya uremitinun me'al tareteyn yeday utevaretinun le'eyneykhon
veishetatachit qodam yeya keqademeta arebe'in yemamin vearebe'in leylavan lachema la akhalit umaya la isheteyti 'al kal choveykhon di chavetun leme'ebad devish qodam yeya learegaza qodamohi
arey dechelit miqodam rageza vechemeta di regaz yeya 'aleykhon leshetsaa yatekhon veqabil yeya tseloti af bezimena hahi
ve'al aharon hava regaz min qodam yeya lachada leshetsayuteyh vetsaleyti af 'al aharon be'idana hahi
veyat chovatekhon di 'avadetun yat 'egela nesevit veoqedit yateyh benura veshafit yateyh beshufina yaut 'ad di hava daqiq le'afera uremet yat 'afereyh lenachala denachet min tura
uvideleqeta uveniseta uveqiverey dimeshaaley maregezin haveytun qodam yeya
vekhad shelach yeya yatekhon mereqam geya lemeymar seqo veachasinu yat are'a di yehavit lekhon vesarevetun 'al gezerat meymera dayeya elahakhon vela heymanetun leyh vela qabeletun lemeymereyh
mesarevin haveytun qodam yeya mioma dida'it yatekhon
veishetatachit qodam yeya yat arebe'in yemamin veyat arebe'in leylavan di ishetatachit arey amar yeya leshetsaa yatekhon
vetsaleyti qodam yeya vaamarit yeya elahim la techabal 'amakh veachasanetakh di feraqeta betaqepakh di apeqeta mimitserayim bida taqifa
idekhar le'avedaykh leaveraham leyitsechaq uleya'aqov la titepeney leqasheyut 'ama hadeyn ulechoveyhon velachataeyhon
dilema yeymerun dayerey are'a di apeqetana mitaman mideleyt yukhela dayeya lea'alutehon leare'a di malil lehon umidesaney yatehon apeqinun leqatalutehon bemadebera
veinun 'amakh veachasanetakh di apeqeta becheylakh raba uvidera'akh meramema
be'idana hahi amar yeya li pesal lakh tereyn luchey avenaya keqademaey vesaq laqodamay letura veta'ebed lakh arona dea'a
veekhetov 'al luchaya yat pitegamaya di havo 'al luchaya qademaey di tevareta uteshavinun baarona
va'avadit arona dea'ey shitin ufesalit tereyn luchey avenaya keqademaey useleqit letura utereyn luchaya bidi
ukhetav 'al luchaya kikhetava qademaa yat 'asera fitegamaya di malil yeya 'imekhon betura migo eshata beyoma diqehala vihavinun yeya li
veitepeneyti unechatit min tura veshaveyti yat luchaya baarona di 'avadit vahavo taman kema di faqedani yeya
uveney yiserael netalu mibeerot beney ya'aqan lemosera taman mit aharon veiteqevar taman veshamesh ele'azar bereyh techotohi
mitaman netalu legudegod umin gudegod leyatevat are'a nagedan nachalin demayin
be'idana hahi aferesh yeya yat shiveta delevi lemital yat aron qeyama dayeya lemeqam qodam yeya leshamashuteyh ulevarakha vishemeyh 'ad yoma hadeyn
'al ken la hava lelevi cholaq veachasana 'im achohi matenan dihav leyh yeya inun achasaneteyh kema di malil yeya elahakh leyh
vaana haveyti qaem betura keyomin qademain arebe'in yemamin vearebe'in leylavan veqabil yeya tseloti af bezimena hahu la avey yeya lechabalutakh
vaamar yeya li qum zil lemitul qodam 'ama veye'alun veyeretun yat are'a di qayemit laavahatehon lemitan lehon

ukhe'an yiserael ma yeya elahakh tava' minakh elahen lemidechal qodam yeya elahakh limehakh bekhal arechan detaqenan qodamohi ulemirecham yateyh ulemifelach qodam yeya elahakh bekhal libakh uvekhal nafeshakh
lemitar yat piqodaya dayeya veyat qeyamohi daana mefaqedakh yoma deyn lideyeytav lakh
ha dayeya elahakh shemaya ushemey shemaya are'a vekhal di vah
lechod baavahatakh tsavey yeya lemirecham yatehon veitire'ey biveneyhon batereyhon bekhon mikal 'amemaya keyoma hadeyn
vete'edun yat tafeshut libekhon uqedalekhon la taqeshun 'od
arey yeya elahakhon hu elaha dayanin umarey malekhin elaha raba gibara udechila di leyt qodamohi misav apin veaf la leqabala shacheda
'aved din yitam vearemela verachem giora lemitan leyh mezona ukhesu
vetirechamun yat giora arey dayarin haveytun beare'a demitserayim
yat yeya elahakh tidechal uqodamohi tifelach uledachaleteyh tiqerav uvishemeyh teqayam
hu tushebachetakh vehu elahakh da'avad 'imakh yat raverevata veyat chasinata haileyn di chazo 'eynaykh
beshave'in nafeshan nechatu avahatakh lemitserayim ukhe'an shaveyakh yeya elahakh kekhokhevey shemaya lemisegey
vetirecham yat yeya elahakh vetitar materat meymereyh uqeyamohi vedinohi ufiqodohi kal yomaya
vetide'un yoma deyn arey la yat beneykhon di la yeda'u vedi la chazo yat ulefana dayeya elahakhon yat revuteyh yat yedeyh taqifa udera'eyh meramema
veyat atevateyh veyat 'ovadohi di 'avad bego mitserayim lefare'o maleka demitserayim ulekhal are'eyh
vedi 'avad lemashireyat mitserayim lesusavateyh veliretikhohi di atif yat mey yama desuf 'al apeyhon bemiredafehon batereykhon veovadinun yeya 'ad yoma hadeyn
vedi 'avad lekhon bemadebera 'ad meyteykhon 'ad atera hadeyn
vedi 'avad ledatan velaaviram beney eliav bar reuven di fetachat are'a yat pumah uvela'atenun veyat enash bateyhon veyat mashekeneyhon veyat kal yequma di 'imehon bego kal yiserael
arey 'eyneykhon chazaa yat kal 'ovada dayeya raba di 'avad
vetitar yat kal tafeqedeta di ana mefaqedakh yoma deyn bedil detiteqefun vete'alun veteyretun yat are'a di atun 'averin taman lemeyretah
uvedil detorekhun yomin 'al are'a di qayim yeya laavahatekhon lemitan lehon veliveneyhon are'a 'aveda chalav udevash
arey are'a di at 'alel letaman lemeyretah la kheare'a demitserayim hi di nefaqetun mitaman di tizera' yat zare'akh umasheqat leyh beragelakh kegineta yareqa
veare'a di atun 'averin taman lemeyretah ara' turin uviqe'an limetar shemaya tishetey maya
are'a dayeya elahakh tava' yatah tedira 'eyney yeya elahakh bah mereysha deshata ve'ad sofa deshata
vihey im qabala teqabelun lefiqoday di ana mefaqed yatekhon yoma deyn lemirecham yat yeya elahakhon ulemifelach qodamohi bekhal libekhon uvekhal nafeshekhon
veeten metar are'akhon be'idaneyh bakir velaqish vetikhenosh 'iburakh vechamerakh umishechakh
veeten 'iseba vechaqelakh live'irakh veteykhul vetiseba'
isetamaru lekhon dilema yite'un libekhon vetisetun vetifelechun leta'avat 'amemaya vetisegedun lehon
veyiteqof rageza dayeya bekhon veyechod yat shemaya vela yehey mitera veare'a la titen yat 'alaletah veteyvedun biferi'a me'al are'a taveta dayeya yahev lekhon
uteshauun yat pitegamay ileyn 'al libekhon ve'al nafeshekhon vetiqeterun yatehon leat 'al yedekhon vihon litefilin beyn 'eyneykhon
vetalefun yatehon yat beneykhon lemalala vehon bemitevakh beveytakh uvimehakhakh bearecha uvemishekevakh uvimeqimakh
vetikhetevinun 'al mezuzeyan vetiqebe'inun besipey veytakh uvetare'akh
bedil deyisegun yomeykhon veyomey veneykhon 'al are'a di qayim yeya laavahatekhon lemitan lehon keyomey shemaya 'al are'a
arey im mitar titerun yat kal tafeqedeta hada di ana mefaqed yatekhon leme'ebedah lemirecham yat yeya elahakhon limehakh bekhal arechan detaqenan qodamohi uleiteqerava ledachaleteyh
vitarakh yeya yat kal 'amemaya haileyn miqodameykhon veteyretun 'amemin raverevin vetaqifin minekhon
kal atera di tiderokh paresat ragelekhon beyh dilekhon yehey min madebera velivenan min nahara nehar perat ve'ad yama ma'areva yehey techumekhon
la yite'atad enash qodameykhon dachalatekhon veeymatekhon yiten yeya elahakhon 'al apey khal are'a di tiderekhun bah kema di malil lekhon
chazey di ana yahev qodameykhon yoma deyn birekhan ulevatin
yat birekhan di teqabelun lefiqudaya dayeya elahakhon di ana mefaqed yatekhon yoma deyn
ulevataya im la teqabelun lefiqudaya dayeya elahakhon vetisetun min arecha di ana mefaqed yatekhon yoma deyn limehakh batar ta'avat 'amemaya di la yeda'etun
vihey arey ye'elinakh yeya elahakh leare'a di at 'alel taman lemeyretah vetiten yat mevarekhaya 'al tura digerizin veyat melatetaya 'al tura de'eyval
hala inun be'ivera deyaredena achorey orach ma'alaney shimesha beare'a kena'anaa deyatev bemeyshera laqovel gilegela bisetar meysherey more
arey atun 'averin yat yaredena leme'al lemeyrat yat are'a dayeya elahakhon yahev lekhon veteyretun yatah veteytevun bah
vetiterun leme'ebad yat kal qeyamaya veyat dinaya di ana yahev qodameykhon yoma deyn
ileyn qeyamaya vedinaya di titerun leme'ebad beare'a dihav yeya elaha daavahatakh lakh lemeyretah kal yomaya di atun qayamin 'al are'a
abada teabedun yat kal ateraya di felachu taman 'amemaya di atun yaretin yatehon yat ta'avatehon 'al turaya ramaya ve'al ramata utechot kal ilan 'abof
utetare'un yat egoreyhon utetaberun yat qamatehon vaashereyhon toqedun benura vetsalemey ta'avatehon teqotsetsun vetovedun yat shimehon min atera hahu
la ta'ebedun ken qodam yeya elahakhon
elahen leatera di yitire'ey yeya elahakhon mikal shiveteykhon leasheraa shekhineteyh taman leveyt shekhineteyh titebe'un veteytun letaman
vetayetun letaman 'alavateykhon venikhesat qudesheykhon veyat ma'eserateykhon veyat aferashut yedekhon venidereykhon venidevateykhon uvekhorey torekhon ve'anekhon
veteykhelun taman qodam yeya elahakhon vetechedun bekhol oshatut yedekhon atun veenash bateykhon di varekhakh yeya elahakh
la ta'ebedun kekhol di anachena 'avedin hakha yoma deyn gevar kal man dekhashar qodamohi
arey la ateytun 'ad ke'an leveyt neyacha uleachasana dayeya elahakh yahev lakh
veta'eberun yat yaredena veteytevun beare'a dayeya elahakhon machasen yatekhon vinicha lekhon mikal ba'aley devaveykhon misechor sechor veteytevun lerachetsan

vihey atera di yitire'ey yeya elahakhon beyh leasheraa shekhineteyh taman letaman tayetun yat kal di ana mefaqed yatekhon 'alavateykhon venikhesat qudesheykhon ma'eserateykhon veaferashut yedekhon vekhol shefar nidereykhon di tiderun qodam yeya
vetechedun qodam yeya elahakhon atun uveneykhon uvenateykhon ve'avedeykhon veamehateykhon velevaa di veqireveykhon arey leyt leyh cholaq veachasana 'imekhon
isetamar lakh dilema taseq 'alavatakh bekhal atera di techezey
elahen beatera di yitire'ey yeya bechad min shivetaykh taman taseq 'alavatakh vetaman ta'ebed kol di ana mefaqedakh
lechod bekhal re'ut nafeshakh tikos veteykhul bisera kevireketa dayeya elahakh di yehav lakh bekhal qirevaykh mesaava vedakheya yekheluneyh kivesar taveya veayela
lechod dema la teykhelun 'al are'a tishedineyh kemaya
leyt lakh reshu lemeykhal beqirevaykh ma'esar 'ivurakh chamerakh umishechakh uvekhorey torakh ve'anakh vekhal niderakh di tidar venidevataykh veaferashut yedakh
elahen qodam yeya elahakh teykhelineyh beatera di yitire'ey yeya elahakh beyh at uverakh uveratakh ve'avedakh veametakh velevaa di veqirevaykh vetechedey qodam yeya elahakh bekhal oshatut yedakh
isetamar lakh dilema tisheboq yat levaey kal yomaykh 'al are'akh
arey yafetey yeya elahakh yat techumakh kema di malil lakh veteymar ekhul bisera arey titire'ey nafeshakh lemeykhal bisera bekhal re'ut nafeshakh teykhul bisera
arey yiterachaq minakh atera di yitire'ey yeya elahakh leasheraa shekhineteyh taman vetikos mitorakh ume'anakh di yehav yeya lakh kema di paqeditakh veteykhul beqirevaykh bekhol re'ut nafeshakh
beram kema di miteakhel besar taveya veayela ken teykhelineyh mesaava vedakheya kachada yekhelineyh
lechod teqef bedil dela lemeykhal dema arey dema hu nafesha vela teykhul nafesha 'im bisera
la teykhelineyh 'al are'a tishedineyh kemaya
la teykhelineyh bedil deyeytav lakh velivenaykh baterakh arey ta'ebed dekhashar qodam yeya
lechod ma'esar qudeshaykh dihon lakh veniderakh titol veteytey leatera di yitire'ey yeya
veta'ebed 'alavatakh bisera udema 'al madebecha dayeya elahakh vedam nikhesat qudeshaykh yishetefekh 'al madebecha dayeya elahakh uvisera teykhul
tar uteqabal yat kal pitegamaya haileyn di ana mefaqedakh bedil deyeytav lakh velivenaykh baterakh 'ad 'olam arey ta'ebed detaqen udekhashar qodam yeya elahakh
arey yeshetsey yeya elahakh yat 'amemaya di at 'alel letaman letarakha yatehon miqodamakh veteyrat yatehon veteytav beare'ahon
isetamar lakh dilema titaqal batereyhon batar deyishetetsun miqodamakh vedilema titeba' leta'avatehon lemeymar ekhedeyn palechin 'amemaya haileyn yat ta'avatehon vee'ebed ken af ana
la ta'ebed ken qodam yeya elahakh arey kal dimerachaq qodam yeya di saney 'avadu leta'avatehon arey af yat beneyhon veyat benateyhon yoqedin benura leta'avatehon
yat kal pitegama di ana mefaqed yatekhon yateyh titerun leme'ebad la tosefun 'alohi vela timene'un mineyh
arey yequm beynakh neviya o chalem chelema veyiten lakh at o mofeta
veyeytey ata umofeta di malil 'imakh lemeymar nehakh batar ta'avat 'amemaya di la yeda'etanun venifelechinun
la teqabel lefitegamey neviya hahu o lechalem chelema hahu arey menasey yeya elahakhon yatekhon lemida' haiteykhon rachamin yat yeya elahakhon bekhal libekhon uvekhal nafeshekhon
batar dachaleta dayeya elahakhon tehakhun veyateyh tidechalun veyat piqodohi titerun ulemeymereyh teqabelun veqadamohi tifelechun uvedachaleteyh titeqarevun

uneviya hahu o chalem chelema hahu yiteqetel arey malil sateya 'al yeya elahakhon di apeyq yatekhon meare'a demitserayim udefareqakh mibeyt 'aveduta leate'ayutakh min arecha di faqedakh yeya elahakh limehakh bah utefaley 'aved devish mibeynakh
arey yemalekhinakh achukh bar imakh o verakh o veratakh o itat qeyamakh o chaverakh di khenafeshakh besitera lemeymar nehakh venifelach leta'avat 'amemaya di la yeda'at at vaavahatakh
mita'avat 'amemaya di vesacharaneykhon diqerivin lakh o direchiqin minakh miseyafey are'a ve'ad seyafey are'a
la teyvey leyh vela teqabel mineyh vela techus 'eynakh 'alohi vela teracham vela tekhasey 'alohi
arey miqetal tiqetelineyh yedakh tehey veyh beqademeyta lemiqeteleyh vida dekhal 'ama bevatereyta
vetiregemineyh beavenaya vimut arey va'a leate'ayutakh midachaleta dayeya elahakh di apeqakh meare'a demitserayim mibeyt 'aveduta
vekhal yiserael yisheme'un veyidechalun vela yosefun leme'ebad kefitegama visha hadeyn beynakh
arey tishema' bechad miqirevaykh di yeya elahakh yahev lakh lemitav taman lemeymar
nefaqu guverin beney rishe'a mibeynakh veate'ayu yat yatevey qaretehon lemeymar nehakh venifelach leta'avat 'amemaya di la yeda'etun
vetiteba' vetivedoq vetisheal yaut veha qusheta kevan pitegama ite'avida to'eveta hada beynakh
mimecha timechey yat yatevey qareta hahi lefitegam decharev gamar yatah veyat kal di vah veyat be'irah lefitegam decharev
veyat kal 'adaah tikhenosh lego fetayah vetoqed benura yat qareta veyat kal 'adaah gemir qodam yeya elahakh utehey tel chariv le'alam la titebeney 'od
vela yidebaq bidakh mida'am min cherema bedil dituv yeya miteqof rugezeyh veyehav lakh rachamin viracham 'alakh veyaseginakh kema di qayim laavahatakh
arey teqabel lemeymera dayeya elahakh lemitar yat kal piqodohi di ana mefaqedakh yoma deyn leme'ebad dekhashar qodam yeya elahakh
benin atun qodam yeya elahakhon la titechamemun vela teshauun merat beyn 'eyneykhon 'al mit
arey 'am qadish at qodam yeya elahakh uvakh itire'ey yeya lemehevey leyh le'am chabiv mikol 'amemaya di 'al apey are'a
la teykhul kal dimerachaq
deyn be'ira deteykhelun torin imerin direchelin vegadeyan de'izin
ayala vetaveya veyachemura veya'ela vereyma vetorebala veditsa
vekhal be'ira disediqa faresata umatilefa tilefin tareteyn paresata maseqa fishera bive'ira yatah teykhelun
beram yat deyn la teykhelun mimaseqey fishera umimasediqey faresata matilefey tilefaya yat gamela veyat areneva veyat tafeza arey maseqey fishera inun ufaresatehon la sediqa mesaavin inun lekhon
veyat chazira arey masediq paresata hu vela fashar mesaav hu lekhon mibiserehon la teykhelun uvineviletehon la tiqerevun
yat deyn teykhelun mikol di vemaya kol di leyh tsitsin veqalefin teykhelun
vekhol di leyt leyh tsitsin veqalefin la teykhelun mesaav hu lekhon
kal tsipar dakheya teykhelun
vedeyn di la teykhelun minehon nishera ve'ar ve'azeya
uvat kanefa vetarafita vedayeta lizenah
veyat kal 'oreva lizeneyh
veyat bat na'amita vetsitsa vetsipar shachepa venatsa lizenohi
veqadeya veqipofa uvaveta
veqata viraqereqa veshaley nuna
vechavarita veibu lizenah venagar tura va'atalefa
vekhol richasha de'ofa mesaav hu lekhon la yiteakhelun
kal 'ofa dekhey teykhelun
la teykhelun kal nevila letotav 'arel di veqirevaykh titeninah veyeykhelinah o tezabeninah levar 'amemin arey 'am qadish at qodam yeya elahakh la teykhul besar bachalav
'asera te'aser yat kal 'alalat zare'akh deyipoq chaqela shata veshata
veteykhul qodam yeya elahakh beatera di yitire'ey leasheraa shekhineteyh taman ma'esar 'ivurakh chamerakh umishechakh uvekhorey torakh ve'anakh bedil deteylaf lemidechal qodam yeya elahakh kal yomaya
vaarey yisegey minakh arecha arey la tikul lemiteleyh arey yiterachaq minakh atera di yitire'ey yeya elahakh leasheraa shekhineteyh taman arey yevarekhinakh yeya elahakh
vetiten bekhasepa utetsur kasepa bidakh utehakh leatera di yitire'ey yeya elahakh beyh
vetiten kasepa bekhol di yitire'ey nafeshakh betorey uve'ana uvachamar chadat ve'atiq uvekhol di tishealinakh nafeshakh veteykhul taman qodam yeya elahakh vetechedey at veenash beytakh
velevaa di veqirevaykh la tishebeqineyh arey leyt leyh cholaq veachasana 'imakh
misof telat shenin tapeq yat kal ma'esar 'alaletakh beshata hahi vetatsena' beqirevaykh
veyeytey levaa arey leyt leyh cholaq veachasana 'imakh vegiora veyitama vearemela di veqirevaykh veyeykhelun veyisebe'un bedil di yevarekhinakh yeya elahakh bekhal 'ovadey yedakh di ta'ebed
misof sheva' shenin ta'ebed shemiteta
vedeyn pitegam shemiteta detashemet kal gevar marey reshu di yareshey bechavereyh la yiteba' min chavereyh umin achuhi arey qera shemiteta qodam yeya
min bar 'amemin titeba' vedi yehey lakh 'im achukh tashemet yedakh
lechod arey la yehey vakh misekena arey varakha yevarekhinakh yeya beare'a di yeya elahakh yahev lakh achasana lemeyretah
lechod im qabala teqabel lemeymera dayeya elahakh lemitar leme'ebad yat kal tafeqedeta hada di ana mefaqedakh yoma deyn
arey yeya elahakh barekhakh kema di malil lakh vetozef le'amemin sagiin veat la tezuf vetishelot be'amemin sagiin uvakh la yisheletun
arey yehey vakh misekena chad meachaykh bachada miqirevaykh beare'akh dayeya elahakh yahev lakh la tateqef yat libakh vela tiqepots yat yedakh meachukh misekena
ela mifetach tifetach yat yedakh leyh veozafa tozefineyh kemisat cheseroneyh deyachasir leyh

isetamar lakh dilema yehey fitegam 'im libakh biresha' lemeymar qeriva shata shevi'ata shata dishemiteta vetaveesh 'eynakh beachukh misekena vela titen leyh veyiqerey 'alakh qodam yeya vihey vakh chova
mitan titen leyh vela yaveesh libakh bemitenakh leyh arey bedil pitegama hadeyn yevarekhinakh yeya elahakh bekhal 'ovadakh uvekhol oshatut yedakh
arey la yifesoq misekena migo are'a 'al ken ana mefaqedakh lemeymar mifetach tifetach yat yedakh laachukh le'aneyakh ulemisekenakh beare'akh
arey yizedaban lakh achukh bar yiserael o bat yiserael veyifelechinakh shit shenin uveshata shevi'ata tifeterineyh bar chorin me'imakh
vaarey tifeterineyh bar chorin me'imakh la tifeterineyh reyqan
aferasha taferesh leyh me'anakh umeiderakh umima'atsaretakh di varekhakh yeya elahakh titen leyh
vetidekar arey 'aveda haveyta beare'a demitserayim ufareqakh yeya elahakh 'al ken ana mefaqedakh yat pitegama hadeyn yoma deyn
vihey arey yeymar lakh la epoq me'imakh arey rachamakh veyat enash beytakh arey tav leyh 'imakh
vetisav yat maretse'a vetiten beudeneyh uvedasha vihey lakh 'ived palach le'alam veaf leametakh ta'ebed ken
la yiqeshey ve'eynakh bemifeterakh yateyh bar chorin me'imakh arey 'al chad tereyn kaagar agira palechakh shit shenin vivarekhinakh yeya olahakh bekhol di ta'ebed
kal bukhera di yiteyelid betorakh uve'anakh dikherin taqedesh qodam yeya elahakh la tifelach bevukhera detorakh vela tegoz bukhera de'anakh
qodam yeya elahakh teykhelineyh shata veshata beatera di yitire'ey yeya at veenash beytakh
vaarey yehey veyh muma chagir o 'avir kol mum bish la tikesineyh qodam yeya elahakh
beqirevaykh teykhelineyh mesaava vedakheya kachada kivesar taveya veayela
lechod yat demeyh la teykhul 'al are'a tishedineyh kemaya
tar yat yarecha daaviva veta'ebed pisecha qodam yeya elahakh arey beyarecha daaviva apeqakh yeya elahakh mimitserayim va'avad lakh nisin beleyleya
vetikos pisecha qodam yeya elahakh min beney 'ana venikhesat qudeshaya min torey beatera di yitire'ey yeya leasheraa shekhineteyh taman
la teykhul 'alohi chami'a shive'a yomin teykhul 'alohi fatir lechem 'oni arey bivehilu nefaqeta meare'a demitserayim bedil detidekar yat yoma mipeqakh meare'a demitserayim kal yomey chayaykh
vela yitechazey lakh chamir bekhal techumakh shive'a yomin vela yevit min bisera di tikos beramesha beyoma qademaa letsafera
leyt lakh reshu lemikos yat pisecha bachada miqirevaykh dayeya elahakh yahev lakh
elahen leatera di yitire'ey yeya elahakh leasheraa shekhineteyh taman tikos yat pisecha beramesha keme'al shimesha zeman mipeqakh mimitserayim
utevashal veteykhul beatera di yitire'ey yeya elahakh beyh vetitepeney vetsafera utehakh leqirevakh
shita yomin teykhul patira uveyoma shevi'aa kenesh qodam yeya elahakh la ta'ebed 'ivida
shive'a shavu'in timeney lakh mideshareyut magela bachatsad 'umera daaramuta tisherey lemimeney shive'a shavu'in
veta'ebed chaga deshavu'aya qodam yeya elahakh misat nidevat yedakh di titen kema di yevarekhinakh yeya elahakh
vetechedey qodam yeya elahakh at uverakh uveratakh ve'avedakh veametakh velevaa di veqirevaykh vegiora veyitama vearemela di veynakh beatera di yitire'ey yeya elahakh leasheraa shekhineteyh taman
vetidekar arey 'aveda haveyta bemitserayim vetitar veta'ebed yat qeyamaya haileyn
chaga dimetalaya ta'ebed lakh shive'a yomin bemikheneshakh meiderakh umima'atsaretakh
vetechedey bechagakh at uverakh uveratakh ve'avedakh veametakh velevaa vegiora veyitama vearemela di veqirevaykh
shive'a yomin techog qodam yeya elahakh beatera di yitire'ey yeya arey yevarekhinakh yeya elahakh bekhal 'alaletakh uvekhal 'ovadey yedaykh utehey beram chadey
telat zimenin beshata yitechazey khal dekhurakh qodam yeya elahakh beatera di yitire'ey bechaga defatiraya uvechaga deshavu'aya uvechaga dimetalaya vela yitechazey qodam yeya reyqanun
gevar kematenat yedeyh kevireketa dayeya elahakh di yehav lakh
dayanin ufure'anin temaney lakh bekhal qirevaykh di yeya elahakh yahev lakh leshivetaykh vidunun yat 'ama din diqeshot
la tatseley din la tishetemoda' apin vela teqabel shochada arey shochada me'aver 'eyney chakimin umeqaleqel pitegamin teritsin
qusheta qusheta tehey radif bedil deteychey veteyrat yat are'a dayeya elahakh yahev lakh
la titsov lakh asherat kal ilan bisetar madebecha dayeya elahakh di ta'ebed lakh
vela teqim lakh qama di saney yeya elahakh
la tikos qodam yeya elahakh tor veimar di yehey veyh muma kol mida'am bish arey merachaq qodam yeya elahakh hu
arey yishetekhach beynakh bachada miqirevaykh dayeya elahakh yahev lakh gevar o iteta di ya'ebed yat devish qodam yeya elahakh leme'ebar 'al qeyameyh
vaazal ufelach leta'avat 'amemaya usegid lehon uleshimesha o lesihara o lekhal cheyley shemaya di la faqedit
vichauun lakh vetishema' vetiteba' yaut veha qusheta kevan pitegama ite'avidat to'eveta hada beyiserael
vetapeq yat gavera hahu o yat iteta hahi di 'avadu yat pitegama visha hadeyn litera' beyt dinakh yat gavera o yat iteta vetiregeminun beavenaya vimutun
'al meymar tereyn sahadin o telata sahadin yiteqetel dechayav qetol la yiteqetel 'al meymar sahid chad
yeda desahadaya tehey veyh beqademeyta lemiqeteleyh vida dekhal 'ama bevatereyta utefaley 'aved devish mibeynakh

arey yitikhesey minakh pitegama ledina beyn dema lidema beyn dina ledina uveyn makhetash segiru lemakhetash segiru pitegamey felugeta dina beqirevaykh utequm vetisaq leatera di yitire'ey yeya elahakh beyh
veteytey levat kahanaya levaey ulevat dayana di yehey beyomaya hainun vetiteba' vichauun lakh yat pitegama dedina
veta'ebed 'al meymar pitegama di yechauun lakh min atera hahu di yitire'ey yeya vetitar leme'ebad kekhol di yalefunakh
'al meymar orayeta di yalefunakh ve'al dina di yeymerun lakh ta'ebed la tisetey min pitegama di yechauun lakh yamina usemala
ugevar di ya'ebed biresha' bedil dela leqabala min kahana deqaem leshamasha taman qodam yeya elahakh o min dayana veyiteqetel gavera hahu utefaley 'aved devish miyiserael
vekhal 'ama yisheme'un veyidechalun vela yareshi'un 'od
arey te'ol leare'a dayeya elahakh yahev lakh veteyretah veteytev bah veteymar emani 'alay maleka kekhal 'amemaya di vesacharanay
manaa temaney 'alakh maleka di yitire'ey yeya elahakh beyh migo achaykh temaney 'alakh maleka leyt lakh reshu lemanaa 'alakh gevar nukheray di la achukh hu
lechod la yasegey leyh susavan vela yatev yat 'ama lemitserayim bedil leasegaa leyh susavan vayeya amar lekhon la tosefun lemituv beorach hada 'od
vela yasegey leyh neshin vela yite'ey libeyh vekhasepa vedahava la yasegey leyh lachada
vihey khemiteveyh 'al karesa malekhuteyh veyikhetov leyh yat pateshegen orayeta hada 'al sifera min qodam kahanaya levaey
utehey 'imeyh vihey qarey veyh kal yomey chayohi bedil deyelaf lemidechal qodam yeya elaheyh lemitar yat kal pitegamey orayeta hada veyat qeyamaya haileyn leme'ebadehon
bedil dela yerim libeyh meachohi uvedil dela yisetey min tafeqedeta yamina usemala bedil deyorekh yomin 'al malekhuteyh hu uvenohi bego yiserael
la yehey lekhahanaya levaey kal shiveta delevi cholaq veachasana 'im yiserael qurebanaya dayeya veachasaneteyh yeykhelun
veachasana la yehey leyh bego achohi matenan dihav leyh yeya inun achasaneteyh kema di malil leyh
vedeyn yehey dechazey lekhahanaya min 'ama min nakhesey nikhesata im tor im imar veyiten lekhahana dero'a velo'a vequveta
reysh 'ivurakh chamerakh umishechakh vereysh giza de'anakh titen leyh
arey veyh yitire'ey yeya elahakh mikal shivetaykh lemeqam leshamasha vishema dayeya hu uvenohi kal yomaya
vaarey yeytey levaa mechada miqirevaykh mikal yiserael di hu dar taman veyeytey bekhal re'ut nafesheyh leatera di yitire'ey yeya
vishamash bishema dayeya elaheyh kekhal achohi levaey dimeshameshin taman bitselo qodam yeya
cholaq kacholaq yeykhelun bar mimatareta deyeytey veshabata dekhen ateqinu avahata
arey at 'alel leare'a dayeya elahakh yahev lakh la teylaf leme'ebad keta'avat 'amemaya hainun
la yishetekhach bakh ma'avar bereyh uverateyh benura qasem qusemin me'anen umenachesh vecharash
veratin retan veshael bidin uzekhuru vetava' min metaya
arey merachaq yeya kal deya'ebed ileyn uvedil to'avata haileyn yeya elahakh metarakh yatehon miqodamakh
shelim tehey bedachaleta dayeya elahakh
arey 'amemaya haileyn di at yaret yatehon min me'anenaya umin qasamaya shame'in veat la khen yehav lakh yeya elahakh
neviya mibeynakh meachaykh kevati yeqim lakh yeya elahakh mineyh teqabelun
kekhol di sheeleta miqodam yeya elahakh bechorev beyoma diqehala lemeymar la osef lemishema' yat qal meymera dayeya elahay veyat eshata rabeta hada la echezey 'od vela emut
vaamar yeya li otivu di malilu
neviya aqim lehon migo acheyhon kevatakh veeten pitegamey nevuati befumeyh vimalel 'imehon yat kal di afaqedineyh
vihey gavera di la yeqabel lefitegamay di yemalel bishemi meymeri yiteba' mineyh
beram neviya di yaresha' lemalala fitegama bishemi yat di la faqediteyh lemalala vedi yemalel beshum ta'avat 'amemaya veyiteqetel neviya hahu
vaarey teymar belibakh ekhedeyn nida' yat pitegama di la maleleyh yeya
di yemalel neviya bishema dayeya vela yehey fitegama vela yiteqayam hu fitegama di la maleleyh yeya biresha' maleleyh neviya la tidechal mineyh
arey yeshetsey yeya elahakh yat 'amemaya di yeya elahakh yahev lakh yat are'ahon veteyretinun veteytev beqireveyhon uvevateyhon
telat qirevin taferash lakh bego are'akh di yeya elahakh yahev lakh lemeyretah
tetaqen lakh arecha utetalat yat techum are'akh di yacheseninakh yeya elahakh vihey leme'iroq taman kal qatola
vedeyn pitegam qatola deye'iroq taman veyiteqayam di yiqetol yat chavereyh bela manede'eyh vehu la saney leyh meitemaley umideqamohi

vedi ye'ul 'im chavereyh bechuresha lemiqats a'in vetitemereg yedeyh befarezela lemiqats a'in veyishetelef parezela min a'a veyashekach yat chavereyh vimut hu ye'iroq lachada min qirevaya haileyn veyiteqayam
dilema yiredof gael dema batar qatola arey yecham libeyh veyadebeqineyh arey tisegey arecha veyiqetelineyh nefash veleyh leyt chovat din diqetol arey la saney hu leyh mitemali umideqamohi
'al ken ana mefaqedakh lemeymar telat qirevin taferesh lakh
veim yafetey yeya elahakh yat techumakh kema di qayim laavahatakh veyiten lakh yat kal are'a di malil lemitan laavahatakh

arey titar yat kal tafeqedeta hada leme'ebedah di ana mefaqedakh yoma deyn lemirecham yat yeya elahakh velimehakh bearechan detaqenan qodamohi kal yomaya vetosef lakh 'od telat qirevin 'al telat ileyn
vela yishetefekh dam zakay bego are'akh di yeya elahakh yahev lakh achasana vihey 'alakh chovat din diqetol
vaarey yehey gevar saney lechavereyh veyikheman leyh viqum 'alohi veyimechineyh nefash vimut veye'iroq lachada min qirevaya haileyn
vishalechun savey qareteyh veyideberun yateyh mitaman veyitenun yateyh beyad gael dema vimut
la techus 'eynakh 'alohi utefaley ashedi dam zakay miyiserael veyeytav lakh
la tasheney techuma dechaverakh di techimu qademaey beachasanetakh di tachesen beare'a di yeya elahakh yahev lakh lemeyretah
la yequm sahid chad bigevar lekhal 'avayan ulekhal chovin bekhal chet di yecheta 'al meymar tereyn sahadin o 'al meymar telata sahadin yiteqayam pitegama
arey yequm sahid sheqar bigevar leasehada veyh sateya
viqumun tereyn guverin di lehon dina qodam yeya qodam kahanaya vedayanaya di yehon beyomaya hainun
veyitebe'un dayanaya yaut veha sahid sheqar sahada shiqera asehad baachohi
veta'ebedun leyh kema di chashiv leme'ebad laachohi utefaley 'aved devish mibeynakh
udeyishetaarun yisheme'un veyidechalun vela yosefun leme'ebad 'od kefitegama visha hadeyn beynakh
vela techus 'eynakh nafesha cholaf nafesha 'eyna cholaf 'eyna shina cholaf shina yeda cholaf yeda ragela cholaf ragela
arey tipoq laagacha qerava 'al ba'aley devavakh vetechezey susavan uretikin 'am sagi minakh la tidechal minehon arey yeya elahakh meymereyh besa'edakh deaseqakh meare'a demitserayim
vihey kemiqeravekhon laagacha qerava veyiteqeriv kahana vimalel 'im 'ama
veyeymar lehon shema' yiserael atun qerivin yoma deyn laagacha qerava 'al ba'aley devaveykhon la yezu'a libekhon la tidechalun vela tetebahatun vela titaverun miqodameyhon
arey yeya elahakhon dimedabar qodameykhon laagacha lekhon qerav 'im ba'aley devaveykhon lemiferaq yatekhon
vimalelun sarekhaya qodam 'ama lemeymar man gavera di vena veyta chadeta vela chanekheyh yehakh vituv leveyteyh dilema yemut baagacha qerava ugevar achoran yachenekhineyh
uman gavera di netsiv karema vela achaleyh yehakh vituv leveyteyh dilema yemut baagacha qerava ugevar achoran yechalineyh
uman gavera di eras iteta vela nasevah yehakh vituv leveyteyh dilema yemut baagacha qerava ugevar achoran yisevinah
veyosefun sarekhaya lemalala 'im 'ama veyeymerun man gavera dedachel utevir liba yehakh vituv leveyteyh vela yitevar yat liba daachohi kelibeyh
vihey kad yeshetsun sarekhaya lemalala 'im 'ama vimanun rabaney cheyla bereysh 'ama
arey tiqerav leqareta laagacha qerava 'alah vetiqerey lah milin dishelam
vihey im shelam ta'aninakh vetifetach lakh vihey kal 'ama deyishetekhach bah yehon lakh maseqey misin veyifelechunakh
veim la tashelem 'imakh veta'ebed 'imakh qerav utetsur 'alah
veyimeserinah yeya elahakh bidakh vetimechey yat kal dekhurah lefitegam decharev
lechod neshaya vetafela uve'ira vekhol di yehey veqareta kal 'adaah tevoz lakh veteykhul yat 'adaa desaneakh di yehav yeya elahakh lakh
ken ta'ebed lekhal qirevaya di rechiqin minakh lachada di la miqirevey 'amemaya haileyn inun
lechod miqirevey 'amemaya haileyn di yeya elahakh yahev lakh achasana la teqayam kal nishemata
arey gamara tegamerinun chitaey veemoraey kena'anaey uferizaey chivaey vivusaey kema di faqedakh yeya elahakh
bedil di la yalefun yatekhon leme'ebad kekhal to'avatehon di 'avadu leta'avatehon utechovun qodam yeya elahakhon

arey tetsur leqareta yomin sagiin laagacha 'alah lemikhebeshah la techabal yat ilanah laarama 'alohi garezena arey mineyh teykhul veyateyh la tequts arey la khaanasha ilan chaqela lemey'al miqodamakh bitseyara
lechod ilan detida' arey la ilan demaakhal hu yateyh techabal utequts vetiveney khareqomin 'al qareta di hi 'aveda 'imakh qerava 'ad detikhebeshah
arey yishetekhach qetila beare'a di yeya elahakh yahev lakh lemeyretah ramey bechaqela la iteyeda' man qateleyh
veyipequn savaykh vedayanaykh veyimeshechun leqirevaya di sacharanut qetila
utehey qareta diqariva liqetila veyideberun savey qareta hahi 'egelat torey di la itepelach bah di la negidat benir
veyechetun savey qareta hahi yat 'agaleta lenachala vayar di la itepelach beyh vela yizedera' veyineqefun taman yat 'agaleta benachala
veyiteqarevun kahanaya beney levi arey vehon yitire'ey yeya elahakh leshamashuteyh ulevarakha bishema dayeya ve'al meymerehon yehey kal din vekhal makhetash segiru
vekhol savey qareta hahi diqerivin liqetila yasechun yat yedeyhon 'al 'agaleta dineqefeta venachala
vitivun veyeymerun yedana la ashedo yat dema hadeyn ve'eynana la chazaa
kahanaya yeymerun kapar le'amakh yiserael di feraqeta yeya vela titen chovat dam zakay bego 'amakh yiserael veyitekapar lehon 'al dema
veat tefaley ashedi dam zakay mibeynakh arey ta'ebed dekhashar qodam yeya
arey tipoq laagacha qerava 'al ba'aley devavakh veyimeserinun yeya elahakh bidakh vetishebey shiveyehon
vetechezey beshiveya iteta shapirat chezu vetitere'ey vah vetisevah lakh leinetu
veta'elinah lego veytakh utegalach yat reyshah uterabi yat tuferanaha
vete'edey yat kesut shiveyah minah veteytav beveytakh vetivekey yat avuha veyat imah yerach yomin uvatar ken te'ul levatah vetive'alinah utehey lakh leinetu
vihey im la titere'ey vah vetifeterinah lenafeshah vezabana la tezabeninah bekhasepa la titagar bah chalaf di 'initah
arey teheveyan ligevar tareteyn neshin chada rechemeta vachada seniata vilidan leyh benin rechemeta useniata vihey bera vukhera liseniata
vihey beyoma deyachasen livenohi yat di yehey leyh leyt leyh reshu levakara yat bar rechemeta 'al apey var seniata bukhera
arey yat bukhera var seniata yaferash lemitan leyh tareteyn cholaqin bekhol di yishetekhach leyh arey hu reysh taqepeyh leyh chazeya vekheruta
arey yehey ligevar bar satey umarey leytohi meqabal lemeymar avuhi ulemeymar imeyh umalefan yateyh vela yeqabel minehon
veyechedun beyh avuhi veimeyh veyapequn yateyh laqodam savey qareteyh velitera' beyt din atereyh
veyeymerun lesavey qareteyh benana deyn satey umarey leytohi meqabel lemeymerana zalel besar vesavey chamar
veyiregemuneyh kal gaverey qareteyh beavenaya vimut utefaley 'aved devish mibeynakh vekhal yiserael yisheme'un veyidechalun
vaarey yehey vigevar chovat din diqetol veyiteqetel vetitselov yateyh 'al tseliva
la tevit nevileteyh 'al tseliva arey miqebar tiqeberineyh beyoma hahu arey 'al dechav qodam yeya itsetelav vela tesaev yat are'akh di yeya elahakh yahev lakh achasana
la techezey yat tora deachukh o yat imereyh deta'an vetitekevesh minehon atava tatevinun leachukh
veim la qarev achukh levatakh vela yeda'at leyh vetakheneshineyh lego veytakh vihey 'imakh 'ad deyiteba' achukh yateyh vetateyvineyh leyh
vekhen ta'ebed lachamareyh vekhen ta'ebed likhesuteyh vekhen ta'ebed lekhal avedat achukh di teyvad mineyh vetashekechinah leyt lakh reshu leitekasaa
la techezey yat chamara deachukh o toreyh raman bearecha vetitekevesh minehon aqama teqim 'imeyh
la yehey tiqun zeyn digevar 'al iteta vela yetaqen gevar betiquney iteta arey merachaq qodam yeya elahakh kal 'aved ileyn
arey ye'ara' qina detsipera qodamakh bearecha bekhal ilan o 'al are'a eferochin o vey'in veima reve'a 'al eferochin o 'al bey'in la tisav ima 'al benaya
shalacha teshalach yat ima veyat benaya tisav lakh bedil deyeytav lakh vetorikh yomin
arey tiveney beyta chadeta veta'ebed teyaqa leigerakh vela teshavi chovat din diqetol beveytakh arey yipel denafel mineyh
la tizera' karemakh 'eruvin dilema tisetaav dime'at zare'a di tizera' va'alalat karema
la tiredey vetora uvachamara kachada
la tilebash sha'ateneza 'amar vekhitan mechubar kachada
kerusepedin ta'ebed lakh 'al areba' kanefey khesutakh di tekhasey vah
arey yisav gevar iteta veye'ul levatah veyiseninah
vishavi lah taseqofey milin veyapeq 'alah shum bish veyeymar yat iteta hada nesevit ve'alit levatah vela ashekachit lah betulin
veyisav avuha n avuhi de'ulemeta veimah veyapequn yat betuley 'ulemeta laqodam savey qareta litera' beyt din atera
veyeymar avuha de'ulemeta lesavaya yat berati yehavit legavera hadeyn leinetu useninah
veha hu shavi taseqofey milin lemeymar la ashekachit liveratakh betulin veileyn betuley verati veyiferesun shoshifa qodam savey qareta
veyideberun savey qareta hahi yat gavera veyalequn yateyh
veyigebun mineyh mea sile'in dikhesaf veyitenun laavuha de'ulemeta arey apeq shum bish 'al betuleta deyiserael veleyh tehey leinetu leyt leyh reshu lemifeterah kal yomohi
veim qusheta hava pitegama hadeyn la ishetekhachu vetulin le'ulemeta
veyapequn yat 'ulemeta litera' beyt avuha veyiregemunah enashey qaretah beavenaya utemut arey 'avedat qelana beyiserael lezanaa beyt avuha utefaley 'aved devish mibeynakh
arey yishetekhach gevar deshakhev 'im iteta itat gevar veyiteqatelun af tareveyhon gavera deshakhev 'im iteta veiteta utefaley 'aved devish miyiserael
arey tehey 'ulemeta vetuleta dimearesa ligevar veyashekechinah gevar beqareta veyishekuv 'imah

vetapequn yat tareveyhon litera' qareta hahi vetiregemun yatehon beavenaya vimutun yat 'ulemeta 'al 'esaq di la tsevachat beqareta veyat gavera 'al 'esaq de'ani yat itat chavereyh utefaley 'aved devish mibeynakh
veim bechaqela yashekach gevar yat 'ulemeta dimearesa veyiteqef bah gavera veyishekuv 'imah veyiteqetel gavera deshakhev 'imah bilechodohi
ule'ulemeta la ta'ebed mida'am leyt le'ulemeta chovat din diqetol arey kema diqum gavera 'al chavereyh veyiqetelineyh nefash ken pitegama hadeyn
arey vechaqela ashekechah tsevachat 'ulemeta dimearesa veleyt defariq lah
arey yashekach gevar 'ulemeta vetuleta di la mearesa veyechedinah veyishekuv 'imah veyishetakechun
veyiten gavera deyishekuv 'imah laavuha de'ulemeta chameshin sile'in dikhesaf veleyh tehey leinetu cholaf di 'aneyah leyt leyh reshu lemifeterah kal yomohi
la yisav gevar yat itat avuhi vela yegaley kanefa daavuhi
la yidekey defasiq vedimechabal leme'al biqehala dayeya
la yidekey mamezera leme'al biqehala dayeya af dara 'asiraa la yidekey leyh leme'al biqehala dayeya
la yidekun 'amonaey umoavaey leme'al biqehala dayeya af dara 'asiraa la yidekey lehon leme'al biqehala dayeya 'ad 'olam
'al 'esaq di la 'ara'u yatekhon belachema uvemaya bearecha bemipaqekhon mimitserayim vedi agar 'alakh yat bile'am bar be'or mipetor aram di 'al perat lelatayutakh
vela avey yeya elahakh leqabala min bile'am vahafakh yeya elahakh lakh yat levatin levirekhan arey rachamakh yeya elahakh
la titeba' shelamehon vetavatehon kal yomaykh le'alam
la terachaq edomaa arey achukh hu la terachaq mitseraa arey dayar haveyta veare'eyh
benin di yiteyelidu lehon dara telitaa yidekey lehon leme'al biqehala dayeya
arey tipoq masherita 'al ba'aley devavakh vetisetamar mikol mida'am bish
arey yehey vakh gevar di la yehey dekhey miqere leyleya veyipoq lemibara lemasherita la ye'ul lego masherita
vihey lemifeney ramesha yasechey vemaya ukheme'al shimesha ye'ul lego masherita
vaatar metaqan yehey lakh mibara lemasherita vetipoq taman levara
vesiketa tehey lakh 'al zeynakh vihey bemitevakh levara vetachepar bah utetuv utekhasey yat mipeqatakh

arey yeya elahakh shekhineteyh mehalekha bego masheritakh leshezavutakh ulemimesar ba'aley devavakh qodamakh utehey masheritakh qadisha vela yitechazey vakh 'averat pitegam vituv meymereyh mileotava lakh
la timesar 'eved 'amemin leyad riboneyh deyishetezev levatakh milevat riboneyh
'imakh yitev beynakh beatera di yitire'ey bachada min qirevaykh bideyeytav leyh la tonineyh
la tehey iteta mibenat yiserael ligevar 'aved vela yisav gavera mibeney yiserael iteta ama
la ta'el agar zanita vechulefan kaleba leveyt maqedesha dayeya elahakh lekhal nidera arey merachaq qodam yeya elahakh af tareveyhon
la terabey laachukh ribit kesaf ribit 'ivur ribit kal mida'am demiterabey
levar 'amemin terabey velaachukh la terabey bedil divarekhinakh yeya elahakh bekhol oshatut yedakh 'al are'a di at 'alel letaman lemeyretah
arey tidar nedar qodam yeya elahakh la teachar leshalamuteyh arey miteba' yitebe'ineyh yeya elahakh minakh vihey vakh chova
vaarey titimena' leminedar la yehey vakh chova
apaqut sifevatakh titar veta'ebed kema di nedareta qodam yeya elahakh nedaveta di maleleta befumakh
arey titagar bekharema dechaverakh veteykhul 'inevin kenafeshakh sive'akh ulemanakh la titen
arey titagar beqameta dechaverakh vetiqetof melilan bidakh umagela la terim 'al qameta dechaverakh
arey yisav gevar iteta veyive'alinah vihey im la tashekach rachamin be'eynohi arey ashekach bah 'averat pitegam veyikhetov lah get piturin vihav bidah veyifeterinah mibeyteyh
vetipoq mibeyteyh utehakh utehey ligevar achoran
veyiseninah gavera vateraa veyikhetov lah get piturin veyiten bidah veyifeterinah mibeyteyh o arey yemut gavera vateraa denasevah leyh leinetu
leyt leyh reshu leva'alah qademaa di faterah lemituv lemisevah lemehevey leyh leinetu batar di isetaavat arey merachaqa hi qodam yeya vela techayav yat are'a di yeya elahakh yahev lakh achasana
arey yisav gevar iteta chadeta la yipoq becheyla vela ye'ivar 'alohi lekhal mida'am paney yehey leveyteyh shata chada veyachedey yat iteteyh di nesav
la yisav mashekona richeya verikheba arey vehon mite'aved mazon lekhal nefash
arey yishetekhach gevar ganev nafesha meachohi mibeney yiserael veyitagar beyh vizabenineyh veyiteqetel ganava hahu utefaley 'aved devish mibeynakh
isetamar bemakhetash segiru lemitar lachada uleme'ebad kekhol di yalefun yatekhon kahanaya levaey kema di faqedetinun titerun leme'ebad
havey dekhir yat di 'avad yeya elahakh lemireyam bearecha bemipaqekhon mimitserayim
arey tareshey vechaverakh reshu mida'am la te'ul leveyteyh lemisav mashekoneyh
bevara tequm vegavera di at rashey veyh yapeq levatakh yat mashekona levara
veim gevar miseken hu la tishekuv bemashekoneyh
atava tatev leyh yat mashekona keme'al shimesha veyishekuv bikhesuteyh vivarekhinakh velakh tehey zekhuta qodam yeya elahakh
la te'ishuq agira 'aneya umisekena meachaykh o migiorakh di veare'akh beqirevaykh
beyomeyh titen agereyh vela te'ul 'alohi shimesha arey 'aneya hu veleyh hu mesar yat nafesheyh vela yiqerey 'alakh qodam yeya vihey vakh chova
la yemutun avahan 'al pum benin uvenin la yemutun 'al pum avahan enash bechoveyh yemutun
la tatseley din giora veyitama vela tisav mashekona levush aremela
vetidekar arey 'aveda haveyta bemitserayim ufareqakh yeya elahakh mitaman 'al ken ana mefaqedakh leme'ebad yat pitegama hadeyn
arey tachetsod chatsadakh bechaqelakh vetineshey 'umera vechaqela la tetuv lemiseveyh legiora leyitama ulearemela yehey bedil divarekhinakh yeya elahakh bekhol 'ovadey yedakh
arey tachebot zeytakh la tefaley baterakh legiora leyitama ulearemela yehey
arey tiqetof karemakh la te'alel baterakh legiora leyitama ulearemela yehey
vetidekar arey 'aveda haveyta beare'a demitserayim 'al ken ana mefaqedakh leme'ebad yat pitegama hadeyn
arey yehey din beyn guveraya veyiteqarevun ledina vidununun vizakun yat zakaa vichayevun yat chayava
vihey im bar chayava lealeqaa chayava veyiremineyh dayana veyaleqineyh qodamohi kemisat choveteyh bemineyan
arebe'in yaleqineyh la yosef dilema yosef lealeqayuteyh 'al ileyn macha raba veyeqal achukh le'eynaykh
la techod pum tora bideyasheyh
