di ana mefaqedakh yoma deyn lemirecham yat yeya elahakh limehakh bearechan detaqenan qodamohi ulemitar piqudohi uqeyamohi vedinohi veteychey vetisegey vivarekhinakh yeya elahakh beare'a di at 'alel letaman lemeyretah
veim yifeney libakh vela teqabel vetite'ey vetisegud leta'avat 'amemaya vetifelechinun
chaveyti lekhon yoma deyn arey meyvad teyvedun la torekhon yomin 'al are'a di at 'aver yat yaredena leme'al letaman lemeyretah
asehedit bekhon yoma deyn yat shemaya veyat are'a chayey umota yehavit qodamakh birekhan ulevatin vetitire'ey bechayey bedil deteychey at uvenaykh

lemirecham yat yeya elahakh leqabala lemeymereyh uleiteqarava ledachaleteyh arey hu chayaykh veorakhut yomaykh lemitav 'al are'a di qayim yeya laavahatakh leaveraham leyitsechaq uleya'aqov lemitan lehon
vaazal mshe umalil yat pitegamaya haileyn 'im kal yiserael
vaamar lehon bar mea ve'eserin shenin ana yoma deyn leyt ana yakhil 'od lemipaq uleme'al vayeya amar li la te'ibar yat yaredena hadeyn
yeya elahakh meymereyh ye'ivar qodamakh hu yeshetsey yat 'amemaya haileyn miqodamakh veteyretinun yehoshu'a hu 'aver qodamakh kema di malil yeya
veya'ebed yeya lehon kema di 'avad lesichon ule'og malekhey emoraa uleare'ahon di shetsi yatehon
veyimeserinun yeya qodameykhon veta'ebedun lehon kekhal tafeqedeta di faqedit yatekhon
teqifu vealimu la tidechalun vela titaverun miqodameyhon arey yeya elahakh hu dimedabar qodamakh la yishebeqinakh vela yareteshinakh
uqera mshe lihoshu'a vaamar leyh le'eyney khal yiserael teqaf vealim arey at te'ul 'im 'ama hadeyn leare'a di qayim yeya laavahatehon lemitan lehon veat tacheseninah yatehon
vayeya hu dimedabar qodamakh meymereyh yehey vesa'edakh la yishebeqinakh vela yarecheqinakh la tidechal vela titevar
ukhetav mshe yat orayeta hada vihavah lekhahanaya beney levi denatelin yat aron qeyama dayeya ulekhal savey yiserael
ufaqid mshe yatehon lemeymar misof sheva' shenin bizeman shata dishemiteta bechaga dimetalaya
bemeytey khal yiserael leitechazaa qodam yeya elahakh beatera di yitire'ey tiqerey yat orayeta hada qodam kal yiserael vetasheme'inun
kenosh yat 'ama guveraya uneshaya vetafela vegiorakh di veqirevaykh bedil deyisheme'un uvedil deyilefun veyidechalun miqodam yeya elahakhon veyiterun leme'ebad yat kal pitegamey orayeta hada
uveneyhon di la yade'un yisheme'un veyalefun lemidechal yat yeya elahakhon kal yomaya di atun qayamin 'al are'a di atun 'averin yat yaredena taman lemeyretah
vaamar yeya lemshe ha qerivu yomaykh limemat qera yat yehoshu'a veite'atadu bemashekan zimena veefaqedineyh vaazal mshe vihoshu' veite'atadu bemashekan zimena
veitegeli yeya bemashekena be'amuda da'anana veqam 'amuda da'anana 'al tera' mashekena
vaamar yeya lemshe ha at shakhev 'im avahatakh viqum 'ama hadeyn veyite'ey batar ta'avat 'amemey are'a di hu 'al taman beyneyhon veyishebequn dachaleti veyashenun yat qeyami di gezarit 'imehon

veyiteqof ragezi vehon beyoma hahu vearecheqinun veesaleq shekhineti minehon vihon lemibaz veyi'are'an yatehon bishan sagian ve'aqan veyeymar beyoma hahu hala mideleyt shekhinat elahay beyni 'are'uni bishaya haileyn
vaana salaqa esaleq shekhineti minehon beyoma hahu 'al kal bisha di 'avadu arey itepeniu leta'avat 'amemaya
ukhe'an ketivu lekhon yat tushebacheta hada vealefah yat beney yiserael shaveyah befumehon bedil ditehey qodamay tushebacheta hada lesahid biveney yiserael
arey a'elinun leare'a di qayemit laavahatehon 'aveda chalav udevash veyeykhelun veyisebe'un veyitepanequn veyitepenun batar ta'avat 'amemaya veyifelechunun veyiregezun qodamay veyashenun yat qeyami

vihey arey ye'are'an yateyh bishan sagian ve'aqan vetatev tushebacheta hada qodamohi lesahid arey la titeneshey mipum beneyhon arey geley qodamay yat yitserehon di inun 'avedin yoma deyn 'ad la a'elinun leare'a di qayemit
ukhetav mshe yat tushebacheta hada beyoma hahu vealefinah liveney yiserael
ufaqid yat yehoshu'a bar nun vaamar teqef vealim arey at ta'el yat beney yiserael leare'a di qayemit lehon umeymeri yehey vesa'adakh
vahava kad shetsey mshe lemikhetav yat pitegamey orayeta hada 'al sifera 'ad dishelimu
ufaqid mshe yat levaey nateley aron qeyama dayeya lemeymar
sivu yat sifera deorayeta hadeyn uteshauun yateyh misetar arona qeyama dayeya elahakhon vihey taman bakh lesahid
arey ana yeda'ena yat sarevanutakh veyat qedalakh deqasheya ha ve'ad ana qayam 'imekhon yoma deyn mesarevin haveytun qodam yeya veaf arey batar deemut
kenishu levati yat kal savey shiveteykhon vesarekheykhon veemalel qodameyhon yat pitegamaya haileyn veasehed behon yat shemaya veyat are'a

arey yeda'ena batar deemut arey chabala techabelun vetisetun min arecha di faqedit yatekhon ute'ara' yatekhon bisheta besof yomaya arey ta'ebedun yat devish qodam yeya learegaza qodamohi be'ovadey yedeykhon
umalil mshe qodam kal qehala deyiserael yat pitegamey tushebacheta hada 'ad dishelimu
atsitu shemaya veemalel vetishema' are'a imerey fumi
yevasam kemitera ulepani yiteqabal ketala meymeri keruchey mitera denashevin 'al ditea vekhiresisey maleqosha di 'al 'iseba
arey bishema dayeya ana metsaley havu revuta qodam elahana
taqifa deshalemin 'ovadohi arey kal rechateyh dina elaha meheymena demin qodamohi 'avela la nafeq demin qodam zakay veqashit hu
chabilu lehon la leyh benaya di felachu leta'avata dara deasheniu 'ovadohi veishetaniu
ha qodam yeya atun gamelin da 'ama deqabilu orayeta vela chakimu hala hu avukh veat di leyh hu 'avedakh veateqenakh
idekar yomin demin 'alema isetakal bisheney dar vedar sheal avukh vichavi lakh savikh veyeymerun lakh
beachasana 'ilaa 'amemaya befarashuteyh beney anasha qayim techumey 'amemaya lemineyan beney yiserael
arey cholaqa dayeya 'ameyh ya'aqv 'adav achasaneteyh
sapiq tsarekeyhon beare'a madebera uveyt tsachavana ater di leyt maya asherinun sechor sechor leshekhineteyh alefinun pitegamey orayeta netarinun kevavat 'eyneyhon
kenishera dimechish leqineyh 'al benohi mitechofef paris gadepohi meqabelehon menatelehon 'al teqof evarohi
yeya bilechodohi 'atid leasherayutehon be'alema dehu 'atid leitechadata vela yiteqayam qodamohi palechan ta'avan
asherinun 'al taqefey are'a veokhalinun bizat saneeyhon vihav lehon bizat shalitey qirevin venikhesey yatevey kerakin taqifin
yehav lehon bizat malekheyhon veshaliteyhon 'im 'tar ravereveyhon vetaqifeyhon 'ama deare'ahon veachasanetehon 'im bizat cheyleyhon umashireyatehon vedam gibareyhon yitashad kemaya
ve'atar yiserael uve'at atselach teqof qena nikhesin ushevaq palechan elaha de'avedeyh vearegez qodam taqifa defareqeyh
aqeniu qodamohi befalechan ta'avan beto'eveta aregizu qodamohi
dabachu leshedin dileyt behon tserokh dachalan dela yeda'unun chadeta di miqariv ite'avida la ite'asaqu vehon avahatekhon
dachala taqifa diveraakh itenesheyta shevaqeta palechan elaha de'avedakh
ugeli qodam yeya uteqef ragezeyh midearegizu qadamohi benin uvenan
vaamar esaleq shekhineti minehon geli qodamay ma yehey vesofeyhon arey dara deasheniu inun benaya dileyt behon heymanu
inun aqeniu qodamay bela dachala aregizu qodamay befalechan ta'avan vaana aqeninun bela 'am be'ama tafesha aregezinun
arey qidum taqif keesha nefaq miqodamay biregaz veshetsey 'ad sheol ara'it veasef are'a va'alaletah veshetsiyat 'ad seyafey turaya
asef 'aleyhon bishin makhetashay eshetsey vehon
nifichey khafan vaakhuley 'uf ukhetishey ruchin bishan veshen cheyvat bara egarey behon 'im chamat taninaya dezachalin be'afera
mibara tetakel chareba umitevanaya charegat mota af 'ulemeyhon af 'ulematehon yaneqeyhon 'im enash saveyhon
amarit echul ragezi 'aleyhon veeshetsinun evatal mibeney anasha dukheraneyhon
ilulafon rageza desanea kenish dilema yiteraverav be'el devava dilema yeymerun yedana teqifat lana vela min qodam yeya havat kal da
arey 'am meabedey 'etsa inun veleyt behon sukheletanu
ilu chakimu isetakalu veda sevaru ma yehey vesofeyhon
ekhedeyn yiredof chad alefa utereyn ye'erequn leribota elahen arey taqifehon mesarinun vayeya asheleminun
arey la khetaqepana taqepehon uva'aley devavana havo dayanana
arey khefure'anut 'ama disedom pure'anutehon velaqutehon ke'am 'amra machatehon bishin kereyshey cheveyan vetushelamat 'ovadeyhon kimerarutehon
ha khemarat taninaya ks pure'anutehon ukhereysh petaney cheveyan akhezerain
hala khal 'ovadeyhon gelan qodamay genizin leyom dina beotseray
qodamay pure'anuta vaana ashalem le'idan deyigelun meare'ahon arey qariv yom tevarehon umaba' de'atid lehon
arey yedin yeya dina de'ameyh ufure'anut 'avedohi tsadiqaya yitepera' arey geli qodamohi dive'idan dititeqef 'aleyhon machat sanea yehon mitaletelin usheviqin
veyeymar an dachalatehon taqifa dahavo rechitsin beyh
di terav nikhesatehon havo akhelin shatan chamar nisekeyhon yequmun ke'an visa'adunekhon yehon 'aleykhon magen
chazo ke'an arey ana ana hu veleyt elah bar mini ana memit umechayey macheyna veaf maseyna veleyt min yedi meshezev
arey ateqenit bishemaya beyt shekhineti vaamarit qayam ana le'alemin
im 'al chad tereyn kechezu vareqa misof shemaya ve'ad sof shemaya titegeli charebi vetiteqef bedina yedi atev pure'anuta lesaneay uleva'aley devavay eshalem
eravey giray midema vecharebi tiqetol be'amemaya midam qetilan veshiveyan lea'edaa khiterin mereysh sanea uve'el devava
shabachu 'amemaya 'ameyh arey pure'anut 'avedohi tsadiqaya yitepera' ufure'anut yateyv lesaneohi vikhapar 'al are'eyh ve'al 'ameyh
vaata mshe umalil yat kal pitegamey tushebacheta hada qodam 'ama hu vehoshe'a bar nun
veshetsi mshe lemalala yat kal pitegamaya haileyn 'im kal yiserael
vaamar lehon shauu libekhon lekhal pitegamaya di ana masehed bekhon yoma deyn di tefaqedunun yat beneykhon lemitar leme'ebad yat kal pitegamey orayeta hada
arey la fitegam reqa hu minekhon arey hu chayeykhon uvefitegama hadeyn torekhun yomin 'al are'a di atun 'averin yat yaredena taman lemeyretah
umalil yeya 'im mshe bikheran yoma hadeyn lemeymar
saq letura da'avaraey hadeyn tura dinevo di veare'a demoav di 'al apey yerecho vachazey yat are'a dikhena'an di ana yahev liveney yiserael leachasana
umut betura di at saleq letaman vetitekenesh le'amakh kema demit aharn achukh behor tura veitekenish le'ameyh
'al di shaqaretun bemeymeri bego beney yiserael bemey matsut reqam madebera detsin 'al di la qadishetun yati bego beney yiserael
arey miqovel techezey yat are'a uletaman la te'ul leare'a di ana yahev liveney yiserael
veda vireketa di varikh mshe neviya dayeya yat beney yiserael qodam moteyh
vaamar yeya misinay itegeli vezehor yeqareyh mise'ir itechazi lana itegeli vigevureteyh mitura defaran ve'imeyh rivevat qadishin ketav yamineyh migo eshata orayeta yehav lana
af chabivinun leshivetaya kal qadishohi veyt yiserael bigevura apeqinun mimitserayim veinun midaberin techot 'ananakh natelin 'al meymerakh
orayeta yehav lana mshe mesarah yeruta lekhineshat ya'aqov
vahava veyiserael maleka beitekanashut reyshey 'ama kachada shivetaya deyiserael
yechi reuven lechayey 'alema umota tineyana la yemut viqabelun benohi achasanetehon bemineyanehon
veda lihuda vaamar qabel yeya tseloteyh dihuda bemipeqeyh leagacha qerava ule'ameyh tateyvineyh lishelam yedohi ya'ebedan leyh pure'anuta misaneohi vesa'id miba'aley devavohi havey leyh
ulelevi amar tumaya veuraya alebesheta ligevar deishetekhach chasida qodamakh di nasitohi beniseta vahava shelim bechanetohi 'al mey matsuta veishetekhach meheyman
de'al avuhi ve'al imeyh la rachem kad chavu min dina veapey achohi uvenohi la nesiv arey netaru materat meymerakh uqeyamakh la asheniu
kasherin ileyn deyalefun dinaykh leya'aqov veorayatakh leyiserael yeshauun qetoret busemin qodamakh ugemir lera'ava 'al madebechakh
barekh yeya nikhesohi vequreban yedohi teqabal bera'ava tevar charetsa desaneohi udeva'aley devavohi dela yequmun
levineyamin amar rechima dayeya yisherey lerachetsan 'alohi yehi magen 'alohi kal yoma uveare'eyh tisherey shekhineta
uleyosef amar mevarakha min qodam yeya are'eyh 'aveda magedanin mitala dishemaya mile'ela umimabu'ey 'eynavan utehomin denagedan mima'amaqey are'a milera'
ve'aveda migedanin va'alalan mivul shimesha ve'aveda migedanin mereysh yerach birach
umereysh turaya bakiraya umituv raman dila faseqan
umituv are'a umelaah ra'ey leyh dishekhineteyh bishemaya ve'al mshe itegeli vaasana yateyan kal ileyn lereysha deyosef uleganeya s ulegavera parisha daachohi
raba divenohi ziva leyh ugevuran deite'avida leyh miqodam taqepa veruma dileyh bigevureteyh 'amemaya yiqetel kachada 'ad seyafey are'a veinun rivevata deveyt eferayim veinun alefaya deveyt menashe
velizevulun amar chadey zevulun bemipeqakh laagacha qerava 'al ba'aley devavakh veyisaskhar bimehakhakh leme'ebad zimeney mo'adaya birushelem
shivetaya deyiserael letur beyt maqedesha yitekaneshun taman yikesun nikhesat qudeshin lera'ava arey nikhesey 'amemaya yeykhelun vesima demitamera vechala mitegaleya lehon
ulegad amar berikh afetey legad keleyta sharey veyiqetol shiletonin 'im malekhin
veiteqabel beqademeta dileyh arey taman beachasaneteyh mshe safera raba deyiserael qevir vehu nafeq ve'al bereysh 'ama zakhevan qodam yeya 'avad vedinohi 'im yiserael
uledan amar dan taqif kegur areyavan are'eyh shateya min nachalaya denagedan min matenan
ulenafetali amar nafetali seva' ra'ava umeley birekhan min qodam yeya ma'arav yam ginosar vedaroma yerat
uleasher amar berikh mibirekat benaya asher yehey ra'ava leachohi veyiterabey betafenuqey malekhin
taqif kefarezela unechasha mutavakh ukheyomey 'ulematakh taqepakh
leyt elah keelaha deyiserael dishekhineteyh bishemaya besa'edakh vetaqepeyh bishemey shemaya
medor elaha di mileqademin bemeymereyh mite'aved 'alema vetarikh miqodamakh sanea vaamar shetsi
ushera yiserael lerachetsan bilechodohi ke'eyn bireketa divarekhinun ya'aqov avuhon leare'a 'aveda 'ivur vachamar af shemaya di'ilaveyhon yeshameshunun betala
tuvakh yiserael leyt dikhevatakh 'ama defureqaneyh min qodam yeya taqif besa'edakh udemin qodamohi nitsechan gibarevatakh vikhadevun saneakh lakh veat 'al periqat tsaverey malekheyhon tiderokh
useleq mshe mimeyshera demoav letura dinevo reysh ramata di 'al apey yerecho veachezeyeyh yeya yat kal are'a yat gile'ad 'ad dan
